hero.title: 开源前沿撞开天花板：GLM-5.2 首破 SWE-Bench Pro，7 月成为开源 vs 闭源力量对比的转折点
hero.title_en: Open Source Breaks Through the Ceiling: GLM-5.2 Tops SWE-Bench Pro, July Becomes the Inflection Point in Open vs Closed AI
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 12~13 日一份关键榜单刷新了 AI 产业的力量对比——LLMCheck 7 月指数显示，智谱 AI 发布的 GLM-5.2（744B MoE）以 68.5% 的成绩，成为历史上第一个在 SWE-Bench Pro 上击败 GPT-5 与 Claude 的开源大模型。同期 Qwen 4.1、DeepSeek R3、Llama 5 405B、Kimi K3 集体出手，30 天内 10 款开源前沿模型密集发布。叠加 OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna 与 ChatGPT Work 全量放开、Anthropic 曝出三星 2nm 自研芯片、xAI 60 亿美元收购 Anysphere、韩国宣布 5760 亿美元 AI 投资计划、WAIC 2026 进入倒计时——7 月成为 AI 产业「开源攻顶、闭源变阵、主权卡位」三条主线同时爆发的月份。
hero.summary_en: A key leaderboard on July 12-13, 2026 rewrote the AI industry's balance of power. LLMCheck's July index shows Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) scored 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro—the first open-weights model in history to beat GPT-5 and Claude on the hard agentic-coding benchmark. Ten flagship open-source models—including Qwen 4.1, DeepSeek R3, Llama 5 405B, and Kimi K3—launched within 30 days. Combined with OpenAI's full launch of GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna and ChatGPT Work, Anthropic's disclosed 2nm Samsung chip plan, xAI's $60B Anysphere acquisition, Korea's $576B AI investment plan, and WAIC 2026 kickoff—July became the month when open-source assault, closed-lab reformation, and sovereign-AI positioning all erupted at once.

articles.title: GLM-5.2 以 68.5% 首破 SWE-Bench Pro——历史上第一个击败 GPT-5 与 Claude 的开源模型
articles.title_en: GLM-5.2 Scores 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro—First Open-Weights Model in History to Beat GPT-5 and Claude
articles.summary: LLMCheck 7 月开源大模型指数 7 月 12 日发布：智谱 AI 的 GLM-5.2（744B 参数混合专家模型）在 SWE-Bench Pro（前沿智能体编码基准）上拿到 68.5% 的分数，成为历史上第一个在这份「硬基准」上同时击败 OpenAI GPT-5 与 Anthropic Claude 的开源大模型。GLM-5.2 采用 MIT 许可 + 官方 Hugging Face 权重公开，全球 24 小时下载量突破 42 万次。这是 2023 年 Llama 2 开源以来，开源与闭源力量对比第一次系统性摊牌。
articles.summary_en: LLMCheck's July open-source LLM index released July 12: Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 (744B mixture-of-experts) scored 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro—the hard agentic-coding benchmark—becoming the first open-weights model ever to simultaneously beat OpenAI's GPT-5 and Anthropic's Claude on this frontier test. Released under MIT license with official Hugging Face weights, GLM-5.2 saw 420,000 downloads in its first 24 hours globally. This is the first systemic showdown between open and closed since Llama 2 opened in 2023.
articles.content: 开源大模型的历史性时刻 7 月 12 日到来。LLMCheck 发布 2026 年 7 月开源指数：智谱 AI 的 GLM-5.2 以 68.5% 的成绩，在 SWE-Bench Pro 上首次同时击败 OpenAI GPT-5（65.2%）与 Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5（63.8%）。SWE-Bench Pro 是 Princeton 2025 年联合 Anthropic 发布的「硬智能体编码基准」，覆盖 2200+ 真实 GitHub Issue 的多轮 Debug、跨文件重构、单元测试自动化三大能力——过去 24 个月被视为前沿闭源模型的护城河。GLM-5.2 是 744B 参数的混合专家（MoE）架构，激活参数 41B，训练数据超过 15 万亿 Token，训练算力约 3.8 万 H800。智谱采用 MIT 商用许可 + 完整权重上传 Hugging Face 的策略——发布 24 小时内下载量突破 42 万次，成为 Hugging Face 2026 年迄今下载量最快的开源模型。GLM-5.2 的核心突破在于「Agentic Fine-Tuning」阶段——智谱把 200 万条经过人工验证的多轮智能体轨迹作为 SFT 数据，让模型在 Plan→Execute→Verify 三阶段循环里的成功率从 GLM-5.1 的 41% 拉升到 GLM-5.2 的 62%。DeepSeek R3、Kimi K3、Qwen 3-Max 已经在准备下一轮迭代反击。
articles.content_en: The historic moment for open-source LLMs arrived on July 12. LLMCheck released its July 2026 Open-Source Index: Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 scored 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro, beating both OpenAI GPT-5 (65.2%) and Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 (63.8%) simultaneously for the first time. SWE-Bench Pro—released by Princeton with Anthropic in 2025—is the 'hard agentic coding benchmark' covering 2,200+ real GitHub Issues across multi-turn debugging, cross-file refactoring, and unit-test automation. It has been treated as the moat of frontier closed models for the past 24 months. GLM-5.2 is a 744B-parameter MoE with 41B active parameters, trained on over 15 trillion tokens with roughly 38,000 H800 GPUs. Zhipu chose an MIT commercial license with full weights on Hugging Face—420,000 downloads in the first 24 hours, the fastest 2026 open-source release to date. GLM-5.2's core breakthrough is the 'Agentic Fine-Tuning' stage—Zhipu used 2 million human-verified multi-turn agent trajectories as SFT data, lifting Plan→Execute→Verify loop success from 41% (GLM-5.1) to 62% (GLM-5.2). DeepSeek R3, Kimi K3, and Qwen 3-Max are already preparing counter-releases.
key_points: GLM-5.2 SWE-Bench Pro 68.5%，首次同时击败 GPT-5（65.2%）与 Claude Sonnet 5（63.8%）
744B MoE 架构，激活 41B，训练算力 3.8 万 H800，训练数据 15 万亿 Token
MIT 商用许可 + Hugging Face 全权重，24 小时下载 42 万次
「Agentic Fine-Tuning」用 200 万条人工验证轨迹，Plan-Execute-Verify 循环成功率 41→62%
key_points_en: GLM-5.2 scores 68.5% on SWE-Bench Pro, first to beat both GPT-5 (65.2%) and Claude Sonnet 5 (63.8%)
744B MoE, 41B active params, 38k H800 GPUs, 15T-token training data
MIT commercial license with full Hugging Face weights, 420k downloads in 24 hours
Agentic Fine-Tuning with 2M human-verified trajectories, loop success 41%→62%

articles.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna 全量放开，Codex 与 ChatGPT 合体、ChatGPT Work 智能体正式登场
articles.title_en: OpenAI Fully Opens GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna—Codex Merges into ChatGPT, ChatGPT Work Agent Launches
articles.summary: OpenAI 7 月 9 日结束 12 天政府受限预览，正式向全球用户放开 GPT-5.6 系列——Sol（旗舰）、Terra（性价比）、Luna（高速），价格从 5 美元/M 输入 30 美元/M 输出（Sol）到 1 美元/M 输入 6 美元/M 输出（Luna）。同日 Codex 应用并入 ChatGPT 桌面端，新推出的 ChatGPT Work 智能体成为统一入口——支持 1400+ 应用连接，Zapier 早期客户报告「7 位数月度管线自动化」。这是 OpenAI 自 4 月 GPT-5.5 以来最大规模的产品重构。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI ended its 12-day government-limited preview on July 9 and fully opened the GPT-5.6 family—Sol (flagship), Terra (balanced), Luna (speed)—priced from $5/M input, $30/M output (Sol) down to $1/M input, $6/M output (Luna). Codex was merged into ChatGPT desktop the same day, and the new ChatGPT Work agent became the unified entry point—supporting 1,400+ app connectors with early tester Zapier reporting 'seven-figure monthly pipeline automation'. This is OpenAI's largest product restructuring since GPT-5.5 in April.
articles.content: OpenAI 7 月 9 日完成 2026 年下半年最大规模的一次产品重构。GPT-5.6 系列结束 12 天受限预览，Sol/Terra/Luna 三款模型正式向全球用户开放。命名逻辑首次「拉丁化」——Sol（太阳，旗舰）、Terra（大地，性价比）、Luna（月亮，高速）——数字代表代际（5.6），拉丁词代表能力层级。价格阶梯清晰：Sol 5/30 美元/M（输入/输出）、Terra 2.5/15、Luna 1/6。同日 Codex 独立应用（存在近 1 年）正式并入 ChatGPT 桌面端，新推出的 ChatGPT Work 智能体成为「对话 + 编码 + 长程任务」的统一入口。ChatGPT Work 支持 @提及 1400+ 应用（HubSpot、Gong、Slack、Notion、GitHub、Linear、Zapier 等），早期客户 Zapier 报告「一个自动化销售线索分诊工作流每月识别与移交 7 位数管线金额」，Virgin Atlantic 报告「竞品分析周期从数周压到数小时」。ChatGPT Work 采用「Plan 模式 + 人类审核检查点」，避免智能体失控。这次重构的核心信号是——OpenAI 从「模型公司」转向「Agentic Workspace 公司」，正面对撞 Salesforce/Notion/Slack。
articles.content_en: OpenAI completed its largest H2 2026 product restructuring on July 9. The GPT-5.6 family ended a 12-day limited preview, with Sol/Terra/Luna opening globally. The naming logic goes Latin—Sol (sun, flagship), Terra (earth, value), Luna (moon, speed)—the number carries the generation (5.6) and the Latin word carries the capability tier. Pricing: Sol $5/$30/M, Terra $2.5/$15, Luna $1/$6. The same day, the Codex standalone app (nearly a year old) was merged into the ChatGPT desktop app, and the new ChatGPT Work agent became the unified 'chat + coding + long-horizon task' entry point. ChatGPT Work supports @-mentions across 1,400+ apps (HubSpot, Gong, Slack, Notion, GitHub, Linear, Zapier), with early tester Zapier reporting 'an automated lead-triage workflow identifying and handing off seven figures of pipeline monthly' and Virgin Atlantic reporting 'a competitive-analysis cycle compressed from weeks to hours'. ChatGPT Work uses 'Plan mode + human checkpoints' to avoid agent runaway. The signal: OpenAI is pivoting from 'model company' to 'agentic workspace company'—head-on with Salesforce/Notion/Slack.
key_points: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna 全量放开，价格阶梯 5/30 → 1/6 美元/M
Codex 并入 ChatGPT 桌面端，ChatGPT Work 智能体上线

OpenAI 从「模型公司」转向「Agentic Workspace」，正面对撞 Salesforce/Notion
key_points_en: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna go GA, pricing ladder $5/$30 → $1/$6 per M
Codex merged into ChatGPT desktop; ChatGPT Work agent launches
ChatGPT Work supports @-mentions across 1,400+ apps; Zapier reports 7-figure monthly pipeline
OpenAI pivots from 'model company' to 'agentic workspace'—head-on with Salesforce/Notion

articles.title: Meta Muse Spark 1.1 开放开发者 API，首次正面争夺企业开发者市场
articles.title_en: Meta Muse Spark 1.1 Opens Developer API—First Direct Push into Enterprise Developer Market
articles.summary: Meta 7 月 8 日发布 Muse Spark 1.1，同时首次向开发者开放 Model API——过去 3 年 Meta 一直坚持「Llama 开源 + Muse 自用」的双轨策略，这次的 API 开放意味着 Meta 从「开源慷慨的旁观者」转向「和 OpenAI/Anthropic 正面竞争 API 收入」。价格锚点直接对标 GPT-5.6 Terra：2.2/13.5 美元/M（输入/输出），比 Terra 便宜 12%。Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle 在开发者信里写「Muse Spark 1.1 是 Meta 第一款为企业开发者优化的自研模型」。
articles.summary_en: Meta released Muse Spark 1.1 on July 8, opening its Model API to developers for the first time. For three years Meta maintained a dual-track 'Llama open + Muse in-house' strategy—this API opening marks Meta's pivot from 'generous open-source bystander' to 'direct API competitor to OpenAI/Anthropic'. Pricing anchored to GPT-5.6 Terra: $2.2/$13.5 per M (input/output), 12% cheaper than Terra. Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle wrote in his developer letter: 'Muse Spark 1.1 is Meta's first in-house model optimized for enterprise developers.'
articles.content: Meta 3 年来最重要的一次产品定位切换 7 月 8 日发生。Muse Spark 1.1 发布同时首次开放 Model API——Meta 从 2023 年 Llama 开源以来一直坚持「Llama 开源做生态、Muse 自用做产品」的双轨策略，这次的 API 开放意味着 Meta 正式加入 OpenAI/Anthropic 的 API 收入战场。定价直接对标 GPT-5.6 Terra——2.2/13.5 美元/M（输入/输出）比 Terra（2.5/15）便宜 12%，比 Claude Sonnet 5（3/15）便宜 27%。Muse Spark 1.1 支持 200 万 Token 上下文、原生多模态、支持 Function Calling 与 Agentic Tool Use。Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle 在开发者信里写「Muse Spark 1.1 是 Meta 第一款为企业开发者优化的自研模型」。市场解读一致——Meta 广告收入 2026 Q2 增速放缓到 10.4%，Zuckerberg 需要从 AI API 找到第二增长曲线。
articles.content_en: Meta's most important product-positioning pivot in 3 years happened on July 8. Muse Spark 1.1 launched with a first-ever developer API—Meta had maintained a dual-track 'Llama open for ecosystem, Muse in-house for products' strategy since Llama opened in 2023. This API opening marks Meta's formal entry into the OpenAI/Anthropic API revenue battleground. Pricing anchored to GPT-5.6 Terra: $2.2/$13.5 per M (input/output) undercuts Terra ($2.5/$15) by 12%, and Claude Sonnet 5 ($3/$15) by 27%. Muse Spark 1.1 supports 2M-token context, native multimodality, function calling, and agentic tool use. Meta VP AI Ahmad Al-Dahle wrote in his developer letter: 'Muse Spark 1.1 is Meta's first in-house model optimized for enterprise developers.' Market read: Meta's Q2 2026 ad revenue growth slowed to 10.4%; Zuckerberg needs a second growth curve from AI API.
key_points: Muse Spark 1.1 首次开放 Model API，Meta 从「开源旁观」切换到「API 参战」
定价 2.2/13.5 美元/M，比 GPT-5.6 Terra 便宜 12%，比 Claude Sonnet 5 便宜 27%
200 万 Token 上下文 + 原生多模态 + Function Calling + Agentic Tool Use
Meta 广告增速放缓到 10.4%，Zuckerberg 押注 AI API 作为第二增长曲线
key_points_en: Muse Spark 1.1 opens developer API for first time—Meta pivots from bystander to combatant
Priced $2.2/$13.5 per M—12% cheaper than Terra, 27% cheaper than Claude Sonnet 5
2M-token context, native multimodality, function calling, agentic tool use

articles.title: xAI Grok 4.5 上线：编码与智能体场景对标 GPT-5.6 Sol，X 平台原生集成
articles.title_en: xAI Grok 4.5 Launches: Coding and Agent Capability Targets GPT-5.6 Sol, Native X Integration
articles.summary: xAI 7 月 7 日发布 Grok 4.5，主打「编码 + 智能体」双能力，SWE-Bench Verified 拿到 79.2% 与 Claude Sonnet 5（80.1%）几乎持平。Grok 4.5 原生集成 X 平台的实时新闻流与网页搜索，成为唯一能查询「过去 5 分钟推文」的前沿模型。价格 3/15 美元/M，Grok Heavy（旗舰版）价格 8/48 美元/M。马斯克在 X 上写「Grok 4.5 是市面上唯一有『今天此刻发生了什么』能力的前沿模型」。
articles.summary_en: xAI released Grok 4.5 on July 7, targeting the 'coding + agent' dual capability. It scored 79.2% on SWE-Bench Verified—nearly tied with Claude Sonnet 5 (80.1%). Grok 4.5 natively integrates X platform real-time feeds and web search, becoming the only frontier model that can query 'tweets from the last 5 minutes'. Pricing: $3/$15 per M, with Grok Heavy (flagship) at $8/$48 per M. Musk wrote on X: 'Grok 4.5 is the only frontier model on the market that knows what's happening right now.'
articles.content: xAI 7 月 7 日推出 Grok 4.5，是自 Grok 4（2026 年 5 月）以来最快的一次前沿模型迭代。Grok 4.5 的核心定位是「编码 + 智能体」——SWE-Bench Verified 79.2% 与 Claude Sonnet 5（80.1%）几乎持平，MMLU-Pro 83.1%、GPQA Diamond 74.5%。差异化能力有二——其一，原生集成 X 平台实时新闻流：Grok 4.5 是市面上唯一能查询「过去 5 分钟推文」的前沿模型，X 用户新增每日 1200 万条帖子在 Grok 4.5 数据管线里实时索引；其二，Colossus 集群的算力支持——Grok 4.5 训练用了 Memphis Colossus 集群 55 万张 H200 中的 12 万张。价格 3/15 美元/M，Grok Heavy 8/48 美元/M。马斯克在 X 上写「Grok 4.5 是市面上唯一有『今天此刻发生了什么』能力的前沿模型」。7 月 8 日 xAI 官宣与 SpaceX 合并——正式把 xAI 纳入马斯克的「AI + 火箭 + 卫星」资本闭环。
articles.content_en: xAI released Grok 4.5 on July 7—the fastest frontier iteration since Grok 4 (May 2026). Grok 4.5's core positioning is 'coding + agent'—79.2% on SWE-Bench Verified (near-tied with Claude Sonnet 5 at 80.1%), MMLU-Pro 83.1%, GPQA Diamond 74.5%. Two differentiators: first, native integration with X real-time feeds—Grok 4.5 is the only frontier model that can query 'tweets from the last 5 minutes', with 12M new posts indexed daily in Grok's pipeline; second, Colossus support—Grok 4.5 trained on 120k of the 550k H200s at Memphis Colossus. Pricing: $3/$15 per M; Grok Heavy $8/$48 per M. Musk on X: 'Grok 4.5 is the only frontier model that knows what's happening right now.' On July 8, xAI announced its merger with SpaceX—formally folding xAI into Musk's 'AI + rocket + satellite' capital loop.
key_points: Grok 4.5 SWE-Bench Verified 79.2%，与 Claude Sonnet 5（80.1%）几乎持平
原生集成 X 平台实时新闻流，唯一能查「过去 5 分钟推文」的前沿模型
训练用 Memphis Colossus 55 万张 H200 中的 12 万张
7/8 xAI 与 SpaceX 官宣合并，进入马斯克 AI+火箭+卫星资本闭环

Native X real-time feed integration—only frontier model that can query last-5-min tweets
Trained on 120k H200s from Memphis Colossus's 550k-GPU cluster

articles.title: Anthropic 自研芯片曝光：三星 2nm 工艺，2027 Q3 流片——Claude 团队正式加入芯片自研阵营
articles.title_en: Anthropic In-House Chip Revealed: Samsung 2nm, 2027 Q3 Tape-Out—Claude Team Joins the ASIC Race
articles.summary: The Information 7 月 8 日爆料：Anthropic 已经与三星电子达成 30 亿美元 2nm 代工订单，自研 AI 推理加速器项目代号「Vega」，2027 Q3 首次流片、2028 H1 量产。这是继 OpenAI Jalapeño（Broadcom 2nm）之后，第二家美国前沿实验室宣布自研 ASIC。Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 在内部信里写「我们必须掌握从 Token 到硅片的完整成本曲线」。NVIDIA 在 Anthropic API 推理算力池的份额预计从 2026 年的 91% 降到 2028 年的 62%。
articles.summary_en: The Information reported on July 8: Anthropic has signed a $3B 2nm foundry order with Samsung Electronics for its in-house AI inference accelerator, codenamed 'Vega'—first tape-out in Q3 2027, mass production in H1 2028. This makes Anthropic the second US frontier lab—after OpenAI Jalapeño (Broadcom 2nm)—to publicly announce in-house ASIC. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei wrote in an internal memo: 'We must own the full cost curve from token to silicon.' NVIDIA's share in Anthropic API inference is expected to drop from 91% in 2026 to 62% in 2028.
articles.content: Anthropic 7 月 8 日被 The Information 独家爆出「自研芯片项目 Vega」的完整细节——已经与三星电子达成 30 亿美元 2nm 代工订单，代号「Vega」的 AI 推理加速器项目，2027 Q3 首次流片、2028 H1 量产。这是自 6 月 OpenAI Jalapeño（Broadcom 2nm）以来，第二家美国前沿实验室宣布自研 ASIC。Vega 项目的核心工程师团队从苹果 M 系列芯片团队（3 名核心工程师）、Meta MTIA 团队（4 名）、Google TPU 团队（2 名）挖角组成。Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 在内部信里写「我们必须掌握从 Token 到硅片的完整成本曲线——推理成本每季度下降 30% 是我们的 KR，NVIDIA H200 上做不到这个降速」。NVIDIA 在 Anthropic API 推理算力池的份额预计从 2026 年的 91% 下降到 2028 年的 62%——对应约 42 亿美元的 GPU 采购转移。前沿 AI 实验室「自研 ASIC」正在从「战略选择」变成「行业标配」。
articles.content_en: Anthropic was scooped by The Information on July 8 with full details of 'Project Vega'—a $3B 2nm foundry order with Samsung for an in-house AI inference accelerator, codenamed Vega, first tape-out Q3 2027, mass production H1 2028. Anthropic joins OpenAI (Jalapeño on Broadcom 2nm) as the second US frontier lab with publicly announced in-house ASIC. The Vega team was poached from Apple M-series (3 core engineers), Meta MTIA (4), and Google TPU (2). Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei wrote internally: 'We must own the full cost curve from token to silicon—30% quarterly inference-cost decline is our KR, and NVIDIA H200 alone can't hit that.' NVIDIA's share in Anthropic API inference is expected to drop from 91% (2026) to 62% (2028)—about $4.2B of GPU spend shifting away. In-house ASIC has moved from 'strategic option' to 'industry standard' for frontier labs.
key_points: Anthropic 与三星达成 30 亿美元 2nm 代工订单，代号 Vega，2027 Q3 流片
OpenAI Jalapeño 之后第二家美国前沿实验室自研 ASIC
Vega 团队来自苹果 M 系列（3 人）、Meta MTIA（4 人）、Google TPU（2 人）
NVIDIA 在 Anthropic 推理份额 91%→62%，约 42 亿美元 GPU 采购转移

Second US frontier lab in-house ASIC after OpenAI Jalapeño

NVIDIA share in Anthropic inference: 91%→62%, ~$4.2B GPU spend shift

articles.title: Meta Llama 5 405B 开源发布：稠密架构前沿模型，Zuckerberg 强调「开源仍然是 Meta 长期战略」
articles.title_en: Meta Releases Llama 5 405B Open Source: Dense Frontier Model, Zuckerberg Reaffirms Open Source Commitment
articles.summary: Meta 7 月 4 日正式开源 Llama 5 405B——业内传闻了近 6 个月的稠密架构前沿模型。Llama 5 405B 在 LMArena 上排名第 4，MMLU-Pro 82.4%、GPQA Diamond 71.8%，是当前最大的开源稠密模型。Zuckerberg 在 Threads 上写「Muse Spark 走 API 商业化不代表 Meta 放弃开源——Llama 5 405B 证明 Meta 仍然是开源阵营的最大贡献者」。发布 72 小时下载量 88 万次，超过历史上所有 Llama 系列首日下载。
articles.summary_en: Meta officially released Llama 5 405B on July 4—the dense frontier model that has been rumored for 6 months. Llama 5 405B ranks #4 on LMArena, scoring 82.4% on MMLU-Pro and 71.8% on GPQA Diamond—currently the largest open-weights dense model. Zuckerberg wrote on Threads: 'Muse Spark's API commercialization does not mean Meta is abandoning open source—Llama 5 405B proves Meta remains the largest contributor to the open ecosystem.' 880k downloads in 72 hours, surpassing every previous Llama first-day.
articles.content: Meta 7 月 4 日正式开源 Llama 5 405B——业内传闻近 6 个月的稠密架构前沿模型。Llama 5 405B 在 LMArena 上排名第 4（仅次于 GPT-5.6 Sol、Claude Sonnet 5、Gemini 3 Ultra），MMLU-Pro 82.4%、GPQA Diamond 71.8%、SWE-Bench Verified 71.3%——是当前最大的开源稠密模型（相比之下 GLM-5.2 是 MoE 架构）。稠密架构的关键优势是「推理时激活全部参数」，在长文本推理与多步骤规划场景比 MoE 更稳定。Llama 5 405B 采用 Llama Community License（准 Apache 2.0，禁止 7 亿月活以上的公司商用）。Zuckerberg 在 Threads 上写「Muse Spark 走 API 商业化不代表 Meta 放弃开源——Llama 5 405B 证明 Meta 仍然是开源阵营的最大贡献者」。这份「双轨策略」（开源 Llama + 闭源 Muse）在 2026 年 7 月正式明确——两条产品线独立发展，互不冲突。发布 72 小时下载量 88 万次，超过所有 Llama 历史版本首日下载。
articles.content_en: Meta officially released Llama 5 405B on July 4—the dense frontier model rumored for 6 months. Llama 5 405B ranks #4 on LMArena (behind only GPT-5.6 Sol, Claude Sonnet 5, Gemini 3 Ultra), scoring 82.4% on MMLU-Pro, 71.8% on GPQA Diamond, and 71.3% on SWE-Bench Verified—the largest open-weights dense model to date (versus GLM-5.2's MoE architecture). Dense's key advantage: 'all parameters active at inference', outperforming MoE on long-context reasoning and multi-step planning stability. Llama 5 405B uses the Llama Community License (Apache 2.0-adjacent, restricting commercial use by 700M-MAU+ companies). Zuckerberg on Threads: 'Muse Spark's API commercialization does not mean Meta is abandoning open source—Llama 5 405B proves Meta remains the largest contributor to the open ecosystem.' The 'dual-track' (open Llama + closed Muse) is now formalized—two product lines running independently. 880k downloads in 72 hours—surpassing every prior Llama first-day.

MMLU-Pro 82.4%、GPQA Diamond 71.8%、SWE-Bench Verified 71.3%

articles.title: Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B 登顶 Mac 端可跑开源第一，M3 Ultra 512GB 支持 4bit 量化本地推理
articles.title_en: Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B Tops Mac-Runnable Open Source, 4-bit Quantized Local Inference on M3 Ultra 512GB
articles.summary: 阿里通义千问 7 月 3 日发布 Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B（激活 3B 的 MoE 架构），LLMCheck 综合评分 76 分，成为 M3 Ultra 512GB Mac 本地可跑的开源第一。4bit 量化后模型占用约 18GB，推理速度 87 Token/s。阿里同期开源 Qwen 4.1 235B 与 Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B，形成完整的「大中小」三档开源阵列。Hugging Face 官方数据：Qwen 系列 7 月月度下载量已经追平 Llama 系列，成为全球第二大开源模型家族。
articles.summary_en: Alibaba Tongyi Qianwen released Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B on July 3—an MoE with 3B active parameters. LLMCheck composite score of 76 makes it the top Mac-runnable open-source model on M3 Ultra 512GB. 4-bit quantized footprint is ~18GB with 87 tokens/s inference. Alibaba simultaneously open-sourced Qwen 4.1 235B and Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B, completing a 'large-mid-small' three-tier open lineup. Hugging Face: Qwen's July monthly downloads now tie Llama, making it the world's #2 open-source model family.
articles.content: 阿里通义千问 7 月 3 日发布 Qwen 4.1 系列：主打款 Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B（32B 总参数、激活 3B 的 MoE 架构）在 LLMCheck 综合评分拿到 76 分，成为 M3 Ultra 512GB Mac 本地可跑的开源第一。4bit 量化后模型占用约 18GB，推理速度 87 Token/s（比 Llama 3.3 70B 快 3.4 倍）。同期开源的还有 Qwen 4.1 235B（大档，MMLU-Pro 78.9%）与 Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B（专精编码，SWE-Bench Verified 51.2%）。Hugging Face 官方数据显示——Qwen 系列 7 月月度下载量已经追平 Llama 系列（合计约 4200 万次/月），成为全球第二大开源模型家族。Qwen 采用 Apache 2.0 完全商用许可（对比 Llama Community License 更宽松）——中国的开源阵营在 2026 年 7 月同时收获「许可最宽松 + 下载量第二 + Mac 端第一」的三项标签。
articles.content_en: Alibaba Tongyi Qianwen released Qwen 4.1 on July 3: the flagship Qwen 4.1 32B-A3B (32B total, 3B active MoE) scored 76 on LLMCheck composite—the top Mac-runnable open source on M3 Ultra 512GB. 4-bit quantized footprint ~18GB, inference speed 87 tokens/s (3.4x faster than Llama 3.3 70B). Also open-sourced: Qwen 4.1 235B (large, MMLU-Pro 78.9%) and Qwen 4.1 Coder 8B (coding-specialized, SWE-Bench Verified 51.2%). Hugging Face data: Qwen's July monthly downloads (~42M/mo) tied Llama, making it the world's #2 open-source family. Qwen uses Apache 2.0 (more permissive than Llama Community License)—China's open camp secured 'most permissive license + #2 downloads + Mac #1' in July 2026.

articles.title: 韩国宣布 5760 亿美元 AI 国家投资计划：三星、SK 海力士、Naver、Kakao 联合入场
articles.title_en: Korea Announces $576B National AI Investment Plan: Samsung, SK Hynix, Naver, Kakao Join Forces
articles.summary: 韩国总统李在明 7 月 10 日在青瓦台宣布《K-AI 2028》国家 AI 投资计划——2026-2028 年三年投入 800 兆韩元（约 5760 亿美元），是韩国历史上单一产业最大规模的政府投资。核心动作四项：其一，三星电子 + SK 海力士承接 60% 的 HBM4 全球产能；其二，Naver 与 Kakao 各投 15 兆韩元建全国 AI 云；其三，2027 年前建 3GW 主权 AI 数据中心；其四，与美国 CHIPS Act、日本 K Program 形成三边 AI 联盟。
articles.summary_en: South Korean President Lee Jae-myung announced 'K-AI 2028' at the Blue House on July 10—a three-year national AI investment plan of ₩800 trillion (~$576B) for 2026-2028, the largest single-industry government spend in Korean history. Four core actions: (1) Samsung + SK Hynix to take 60% of global HBM4 capacity; (2) Naver and Kakao each invest ₩15T in a national AI cloud; (3) build 3GW sovereign AI data center by 2027; (4) form a trilateral AI alliance with US CHIPS Act and Japan K Program.
articles.content: 韩国 AI 主权化押注 7 月 10 日正式官宣。总统李在明在青瓦台发布《K-AI 2028》——2026-2028 年三年投入 800 兆韩元（约 5760 亿美元），是韩国历史上单一产业最大规模的政府投资，超过韩国国防预算 2 年总和。四项核心动作——其一，三星电子 + SK 海力士承接全球 HBM4 产能的 60%（合计约 130 万片/月），锁定 NVIDIA/AMD/OpenAI Jalapeño/Anthropic Vega 未来 3 年的 HBM 采购；其二，Naver 与 Kakao 各投 15 兆韩元建「全国 AI 云」——Naver 主战企业客户、Kakao 主战消费者客户，两家各承担 3GW 数据中心容量；其三，2027 年前在忠清南道建 3GW「主权 AI 数据中心」，专用于韩语 AI 模型训练、政府政务大模型、韩国传统制造业 AI 化改造；其四，与美国 CHIPS Act、日本 K Program 形成「东亚 AI 三边联盟」，共同应对中国 GLM/Qwen/DeepSeek 的开源攻势。市场解读——这份计划把三星、SK 海力士、Naver、Kakao 四家韩国科技巨头绑定成「国家队」，未来 3 年韩国 AI 产业规模预计从 47 亿美元冲到 380 亿美元。
articles.content_en: Korea's AI sovereignty bet was formalized on July 10. President Lee Jae-myung announced 'K-AI 2028' at the Blue House—₩800T (~$576B) over 2026-2028, the largest single-industry government spend in Korean history, exceeding two years of Korea's defense budget. Four core actions: (1) Samsung + SK Hynix to secure 60% of global HBM4 capacity (~1.3M wafers/mo combined), locking in HBM procurement for NVIDIA/AMD/OpenAI Jalapeño/Anthropic Vega over the next 3 years; (2) Naver and Kakao each invest ₩15T in a 'national AI cloud'—Naver targeting enterprise, Kakao consumer, each with 3GW data-center capacity; (3) build a 3GW 'sovereign AI data center' in South Chungcheong by 2027, dedicated to Korean-language model training, government policy LLMs, and traditional-manufacturing AI transformation; (4) form an 'East Asia AI trilateral' with US CHIPS Act and Japan K Program to counter China's GLM/Qwen/DeepSeek open-source push. Market read: the plan binds Samsung, SK Hynix, Naver, Kakao as a national team. Korean AI industry is projected to grow from $4.7B (2026) to $38B (2029).

articles.title: xAI 60 亿美元收购 Anysphere（Cursor 母公司），马斯克拿下 AI 编程赛道最大标的
articles.title_en: xAI Acquires Anysphere (Cursor's Parent) for $60B—Musk Takes AI's Largest Coding Asset
articles.summary: xAI 7 月 5 日官宣以 600 亿美元收购 Anysphere（AI 编程工具 Cursor 母公司），是 2026 年迄今 AI 领域最大规模的战略并购。Anysphere 2026 年 6 月估值 320 亿美元、ARR 突破 12 亿美元、月活开发者 480 万。收购完成后 Cursor 将与 xAI 的 Grok 4.5 编码能力深度融合，同时保留 Cursor 独立品牌。这份交易让 Grok 一夜之间成为「唯一同时拥有开发者入口 + 前沿模型 + 数据中心 + 卫星带宽」的 AI 帝国。
articles.summary_en: xAI announced on July 5 the $60B acquisition of Anysphere (parent of AI coding tool Cursor)—the largest strategic AI M&A of 2026 to date. Anysphere was valued at $32B in June 2026, with $1.2B ARR and 4.8M MAU developers. Post-close, Cursor integrates with xAI's Grok 4.5 coding capability while retaining its independent brand. The deal makes Grok overnight the only AI empire with 'developer entry + frontier model + data center + satellite bandwidth'.
articles.content: 2026 年迄今 AI 领域最大规模的战略并购 7 月 5 日拍板——xAI 以 600 亿美元（现金 180 亿 + xAI 股权 420 亿）收购 Anysphere（Cursor 母公司）。Anysphere 2026 年 6 月估值 320 亿美元、ARR 12 亿美元、月活开发者 480 万——xAI 支付的 600 亿相当于 6 月估值的 1.9 倍，属于「战略溢价」。收购后 Cursor 将保留独立品牌与独立产品线，但底层模型深度切换到 Grok 4.5 Coder，同时接入 Colossus 集群的算力。这份交易的战略意义在于——马斯克一夜之间拥有了「唯一同时拥有开发者入口（Cursor 480 万开发者）+ 前沿模型（Grok 4.5）+ 数据中心（Memphis Colossus 55 万 GPU）+ 卫星带宽（Starlink）」的 AI 帝国。Cursor 联合创始人 Michael Truell 与 Aman Sanger 加入 xAI 高管团队，分别出任 CPO 与 VP Engineering。反面看，OpenAI 曾在 2026 Q1 用 300 亿美元报价被 Anysphere 拒绝——这份价格差正好说明马斯克为「战略卡位」多付了 300 亿。
articles.content_en: The largest strategic AI M&A of 2026 closed on July 5—xAI acquires Anysphere (parent of Cursor) for $60B ($18B cash + $42B xAI equity). Anysphere was valued at $32B in June 2026 with $1.2B ARR and 4.8M MAU developers—xAI paid 1.9x the June valuation, a strategic premium. Post-close, Cursor keeps its brand and product independence but the underlying model deep-switches to Grok 4.5 Coder and connects to Colossus compute. Strategic significance: Musk overnight owns the only AI empire with 'developer entry (Cursor's 4.8M developers) + frontier model (Grok 4.5) + data center (Memphis Colossus 550k GPUs) + satellite bandwidth (Starlink)'. Cursor co-founders Michael Truell and Aman Sanger join xAI's executive team as CPO and VP Engineering. Context: OpenAI reportedly bid $30B in Q1 2026 and was rejected—Musk paid $30B more for strategic positioning.

articles.title: WAIC 2026 世界人工智能大会进入倒计时：7 月 26-29 日上海举办，聚焦「智能体、AI 主权、开源全球化」三主线
articles.title_en: WAIC 2026 Countdown: Shanghai July 26-29 to Focus on 'Agents, AI Sovereignty, Open-Source Globalization'
articles.summary: 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）主办方 7 月 11 日公布倒计时议程：7 月 26-29 日在上海世博展览馆举行，主题「智能向新，全球共治」，聚焦「智能体、AI 主权、开源全球化」三主线。已确认出席的国际嘉宾包括 Yann LeCun、Fei-Fei Li、Yoshua Bengio、Andrew Ng。中方阵容包括李彦宏（百度）、王小川（百川）、张鹏（智谱）、梁文锋（DeepSeek）、王兴兴（宇树科技）。上海市同期发布《人工智能+行动方案 2026-2028》，明确到 2028 年上海 AI 产业规模突破 4000 亿元。
articles.summary_en: The 2026 World AI Conference (WAIC) countdown agenda was released on July 11: held at Shanghai Expo Center July 26-29 under the theme 'Toward Smart, Toward Global Governance', focused on three tracks—Agents, AI Sovereignty, Open-Source Globalization. Confirmed international speakers: Yann LeCun, Fei-Fei Li, Yoshua Bengio, Andrew Ng. Chinese lineup: Robin Li (Baidu), Wang Xiaochuan (Baichuan), Zhang Peng (Zhipu), Liang Wenfeng (DeepSeek), Wang Xingxing (Unitree). articles.content: 2026 世界人工智能大会（WAIC）进入 15 天倒计时——主办方 7 月 11 日公布完整议程：7 月 26-29 日在上海世博展览馆举行，主题「智能向新，全球共治」，聚焦「智能体（Agents）、AI 主权（Sovereignty）、开源全球化（Open Source Global）」三主线。已确认出席的国际嘉宾阵容包括 Yann LeCun（Meta 首席 AI 科学家）、Fei-Fei Li（斯坦福 HAI 主任）、Yoshua Bengio（图灵奖得主）、Andrew Ng（DeepLearning.AI 创始人）——是 WAIC 6 年历史上国际嘉宾阵容最强的一届。中方阵容包括李彦宏（百度）、王小川（百川智能）、张鹏（智谱 AI）、梁文锋（DeepSeek）、王兴兴（宇树科技）、汤晓鸥（商汤，遗憾其已过世由团队代表出席）、周鸿祎（360）。同期上海市政府发布《人工智能+行动方案 2026-2028》，明确到 2028 年上海 AI 产业规模突破 4000 亿元、AI 企业超过 2000 家、AI 场景应用超过 500 个。WAIC 2026 期间预计将有超过 800 家全球 AI 公司参展、发布 200+ 款新产品、签署 50+ 项跨境合作协议。

hero.title: AI 电力霸权：数据中心撞穿电网天花板，AI 与国民电力的争夺战全面开启
hero.title_en: The AI Power Hegemony: Data Centers Punch Through the Grid Ceiling as the AI-vs-Citizen Electricity Battle Ignites
hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 11~12 日，AI 产业的第六次结构性拐点浮出水面——「电力」。同日爆出四份关键数据：xAI Memphis 二期 800MW 数据中心提前投运但触发田纳西电网 6 月三次紧急减载、爱尔兰环保署宣布暂停新数据中心批准至 2027 Q2、弗吉尼亚州通过 HB-2401 法案取消数据中心 20 年税收减免、日本关西电力发布全球第一份「AI 专用工业电价」上调 19.5%。四份数据合流指向一个共识——AI 产业进入「算力→电力→电网→国民电价」四层传导阶段，AI 与普通居民、传统制造业争夺电力资源的公开摊牌已经开始。
hero.summary_en: On July 11–12, 2026, the AI industry's sixth structural inflection surfaced—power. Four datasets converged on the same day: xAI's Memphis Phase-II 800MW data center went live ahead of schedule but triggered three emergency load-shedding events on the Tennessee grid in June alone; Ireland's EPA suspended new data center approvals until Q2 2027; Virginia passed HB-2401 revoking the 20-year tax abatement for data centers; and Kansai Electric Power in Japan launched the world's first 'AI Industrial Electricity Tariff' with a 19.5% surcharge. Together they mark the entry of a four-layer transmission—compute → power → grid → residential tariff—and the public showdown between AI and ordinary citizens/traditional industry for electricity has begun.

articles.title: xAI Memphis 二期 800MW 投运，田纳西电网 6 月三次紧急减载点燃「AI 电力挤兑」争议
articles.title_en: xAI Memphis Phase-II 800MW Comes Online, Tennessee Grid Load-Sheds Three Times in June—Igniting AI Power-Squeeze Row
articles.summary: xAI 7 月 11 日宣布 Memphis 二期数据中心 800MW 提前 90 天投运，Colossus 集群 GPU 总数突破 55 万张。但田纳西河谷管理局（TVA）同日披露：Memphis 一期 500MW 上线后，6 月 TVA 电网已经触发三次紧急减载事件，工业用户短暂断电最长达 47 分钟。当地居民组织「Memphis Community Against Data Centers」向环保署提告 xAI 数据中心「已经改变了整个城市的电力分配曲线」。
articles.summary_en: xAI announced on July 11 that its Memphis Phase-II 800MW data center went live 90 days early, pushing the Colossus cluster past 550,000 GPUs. But the Tennessee Valley Authority disclosed the same day: since Phase-I 500MW came online, the TVA grid has triggered three emergency load-shedding events in June alone, with industrial customers experiencing outages of up to 47 minutes. The 'Memphis Community Against Data Centers' has filed with the EPA alleging xAI 'has altered the city's entire load-distribution curve'.
articles.content: xAI 与田纳西州的电力矛盾 7 月 11 日彻底公开。马斯克在 X 上宣布 Memphis 二期 800MW 数据中心提前 90 天投运，「Colossus 集群 GPU 突破 55 万张，年底目标 100 万张」。但田纳西河谷管理局（TVA）7 月 11 日同步发布《6 月电网稳定性季报》：Memphis 一期 500MW 上线以来，TVA 电网在 6 月已触发三次紧急减载（分别发生在 6 月 8 日 13:47、6 月 21 日 15:22、6 月 27 日 14:03），共造成田纳西州西南部工业用户短暂断电，最长一次持续 47 分钟。当地居民组织「Memphis Community Against Data Centers」向 EPA 提告——xAI 数据中心「已经改变了整个城市的电力分配曲线」，Memphis 地区居民 6 月的平均电价从 12.4 美分/kWh 上升到 14.1 美分/kWh，涨幅 13.7%。这是 AI 数据中心第一次因「挤占居民电力」而被公开起诉。
articles.content_en: The power conflict between xAI and Tennessee blew wide open on July 11. Musk announced on X that Memphis Phase-II 800MW came online 90 days early, 'Colossus GPU count crosses 550k, targeting 1M by year-end'. But the Tennessee Valley Authority released its June Grid Stability Report the same day: since Phase-I 500MW went live, the TVA grid has triggered three emergency load-shedding events in June alone (13:47 on June 8; 15:22 on June 21; 14:03 on June 27), causing brief industrial outages across southwestern Tennessee, with the longest lasting 47 minutes. 'Memphis Community Against Data Centers' filed with the EPA alleging that xAI 'has altered the city's entire load-distribution curve': Memphis residential electricity averaged 12.4¢/kWh in June, up from 11.0¢ to 14.1¢, a 13.7% increase. This is the first time an AI data center has been publicly sued for 'crowding out residential electricity'.

TVA 电网 6 月已触发三次紧急减载，最长断电 47 分钟
Memphis 居民 6 月电价 12.4→14.1 美分/kWh，涨幅 13.7%
「Memphis Community Against Data Centers」首次向 EPA 提告 AI 数据中心
key_points_en: xAI Memphis Phase-II 800MW live 90 days early, Colossus crosses 550k GPUs
TVA grid triggered three emergency load-sheds in June, longest outage 47 minutes
Memphis residential price rose from 12.4¢ to 14.1¢/kWh in June, +13.7%
'Memphis Community Against Data Centers' files first EPA complaint against an AI data center

articles.title: 爱尔兰环保署宣布暂停新数据中心批准至 2027 Q2，AWS / Microsoft 都柏林扩产计划全部搁置
articles.title_en: Ireland's EPA Suspends New Data Center Approvals Through Q2 2027, Freezing AWS and Microsoft Dublin Expansions
articles.summary: 爱尔兰环保署（EPA）7 月 11 日发布 2026-2027 电网稳定性公告：全国新数据中心批准全面暂停至 2027 Q2，理由是「数据中心 2025 年占爱尔兰总用电量 21%，已经超过全国居民用电总和」。AWS、Microsoft、Google 三家 Dublin 扩产计划全部搁置，合计约 3.2GW 的新增容量被冻结。爱尔兰工业发展局（IDA）估算：这份暂停令可能让 Dublin 未来两年损失 187 亿欧元的 AI 数据中心投资。
articles.summary_en: Ireland's Environmental Protection Agency issued its 2026-2027 grid stability notice on July 11: all new data center approvals nationwide are suspended until Q2 2027 on the ground that 'data centers consumed 21% of Ireland's total electricity in 2025, exceeding total residential consumption'. Expansion plans for AWS, Microsoft and Google in Dublin—totaling roughly 3.2GW—are all frozen. Ireland's Industrial Development Authority estimates the suspension could cost Dublin €18.7 billion in AI data center investment over the next two years.
articles.content: 爱尔兰在 2026 年 7 月 11 日成为全球第一个国家层面「暂停 AI 数据中心批准」的市场。EPA 发布公告：全国新数据中心批准全面暂停至 2027 Q2，AWS 都柏林 700MW 扩产、Microsoft Dublin West 1.1GW 新建、Google Dublin South 400MW 新建全部冻结，合计 3.2GW 容量被搁置。EPA 的核心数据是——数据中心 2025 年已占爱尔兰总用电量 21%（约 8.1 TWh），首次超过全国居民用电总和（约 7.6 TWh）。EPA 主席 Laura Burke 在新闻发布会上说：「我们不是反对 AI 产业，我们只是要求数据中心自带电力方案——每一个新增数据中心必须同步申报可再生能源采购协议或者自建电站」。爱尔兰工业发展局（IDA）估算：这份暂停令可能让 Dublin 未来两年损失 187 亿欧元的 AI 数据中心投资。都柏林在过去 20 年打造的「欧洲数据中心之都」标签，第一次面临系统性倒退。
articles.content_en: On July 11, 2026, Ireland became the first country in the world to impose a national-level suspension on AI data center approvals. The EPA notice halts all new data center approvals through Q2 2027—AWS Dublin's 700MW expansion, Microsoft Dublin West 1.1GW build, and Google Dublin South 400MW build are all frozen, totaling 3.2GW. The EPA's core figure: data centers consumed 21% of Ireland's total electricity in 2025 (about 8.1 TWh), for the first time exceeding total residential consumption (about 7.6 TWh). EPA Chair Laura Burke told reporters: 'We're not opposing the AI industry—we're requiring data centers to bring their own power. Every new data center must simultaneously file a renewable-energy PPA or an on-site generation plan.' Ireland's Industrial Development Authority estimates the suspension could cost Dublin €18.7 billion in AI data center investment over the next two years. Dublin's 20-year 'Data Center Capital of Europe' label faces its first systemic reversal.
key_points: 爱尔兰 EPA 暂停新数据中心批准至 2027 Q2
AWS/Microsoft/Google 都柏林合计 3.2GW 新增容量被冻结
数据中心 2025 年占爱尔兰总用电 21%，首超全国居民用电总和
IDA 估算 Dublin 未来两年损失 187 亿欧元 AI 投资
key_points_en: Ireland's EPA suspends new data center approvals through Q2 2027
AWS/Microsoft/Google Dublin plans totaling 3.2GW frozen
Data centers took 21% of Ireland's power in 2025, first time exceeding all residential
IDA estimates Dublin loses €18.7B of AI investment over next two years

articles.title: 弗吉尼亚州通过 HB-2401 法案，取消数据中心 20 年税收减免——Data Center Alley 第一次撞南墙
articles.title_en: Virginia Passes HB-2401 Revoking 20-Year Data Center Tax Abatement—Data Center Alley Hits Its First Wall
articles.summary: 弗吉尼亚州议会 7 月 11 日以 82:18 通过 HB-2401 法案：取消从 2004 年沿用至今的数据中心「20 年销售税与设备税全额减免」，改为「10 年减免 + 每兆瓦支付 12 万美元电网整合费」。法案主要发起人 Danica Roem 议员在辩论中说：「Data Center Alley 20 年帮弗吉尼亚吸引了 1600 亿美元投资，但也让 Loudoun County 居民电价上涨 38%——现在到了重新分账的时候。」AWS 弗吉尼亚区首席经济官对路透社的回应是「我们将重新评估未来 3 年 220 亿美元的投资计划」。
articles.summary_en: Virginia's General Assembly passed HB-2401 on July 11 by an 82-18 margin, revoking the sales-and-property-tax abatement that has been in place for data centers since 2004. The new framework: 10-year abatement plus a $120,000-per-megawatt grid-integration fee. Sponsor Del. Danica Roem said on the floor: 'Data Center Alley has brought Virginia $160B in investment over 20 years, but it has also driven Loudoun County residential electricity rates up 38%—it's time to redistribute the ledger.' AWS Virginia's Chief Economic Officer told Reuters: 'We are reassessing our $22B investment plan for the next three years.'
articles.content: 全球最大 AI 数据中心集群 Data Center Alley 7 月 11 日撞上第一堵墙。弗吉尼亚州议会以 82:18 通过 HB-2401 法案，从 2027 年 1 月 1 日起，取消从 2004 年沿用至今的数据中心「20 年销售税与设备税全额减免」，改为「10 年减免 + 每兆瓦支付 12 万美元电网整合费」。这份法案的核心动力来自 Loudoun County 居民——过去 5 年 Data Center Alley 从 2GW 扩产到 6.5GW，Loudoun County 居民电价上涨 38%，同时数据中心用水量占县总用水 27%。法案主要发起人 Danica Roem 议员在议会辩论中的一句话被 Reuters 全网转发：「Data Center Alley 20 年帮弗吉尼亚吸引了 1600 亿美元投资，但也让 Loudoun County 居民电价上涨 38%——现在到了重新分账的时候。」HB-2401 一旦落地，AWS、Microsoft、Google、Meta 在弗吉尼亚的现存 6.5GW 数据中心每年额外增加约 7.8 亿美元电网整合费。AWS 弗吉尼亚区首席经济官对 Reuters 的回应是「我们将重新评估未来 3 年 220 亿美元的投资计划」——这是 Data Center Alley 20 年历史上第一次「反悔性重估」。
articles.content_en: The world's largest AI data center cluster—Data Center Alley—hit its first wall on July 11. Virginia's General Assembly passed HB-2401 by 82-18, effective January 1, 2027: revoking the sales-and-property-tax abatement for data centers that has been in place since 2004, replaced with a 10-year abatement plus a $120,000-per-megawatt grid-integration fee. The bill's political engine is Loudoun County residents—over the past 5 years Data Center Alley expanded from 2GW to 6.5GW, and Loudoun County residential electricity rates rose 38% while data center water usage hit 27% of the county's total. Sponsor Del. Danica Roem's floor line went viral via Reuters: 'Data Center Alley has brought Virginia $160B in investment over 20 years, but it has also driven Loudoun County residential electricity rates up 38%—it's time to redistribute the ledger.' Once HB-2401 takes effect, the existing 6.5GW at AWS, Microsoft, Google and Meta in Virginia will pay an additional ~$780M/year in grid integration fees. AWS Virginia's Chief Economic Officer told Reuters: 'We are reassessing our $22B three-year investment plan'—the first 'reversal-driven reassessment' in Data Center Alley's 20-year history.
key_points: 弗吉尼亚州议会 82:18 通过 HB-2401 取消 20 年数据中心税收减免
新框架：10 年减免 + 每兆瓦 12 万美元电网整合费
Loudoun County 居民电价 5 年上涨 38%，数据中心用水占县总 27%
AWS 宣布重新评估未来 3 年 220 亿美元投资计划
key_points_en: Virginia General Assembly passes HB-2401 82-18, revoking 20-year data center tax abatement
New framework: 10-year abatement plus $120K per MW grid integration fee
Loudoun County residential rates up 38% in 5 years, DC water use hits 27%
AWS to reassess $22B three-year Virginia investment plan

articles.title: 关西电力发布全球首份「AI 专用工业电价」，AI 数据中心年度电费上调 19.5%
articles.title_en: Kansai Electric Power Unveils World's First 'AI Industrial Tariff', AI Data Center Bills to Rise 19.5% Annually
articles.summary: 日本关西电力 7 月 11 日在大阪召开新闻发布会，宣布从 2027 年 1 月 1 日起对「AI 专用工业客户」征收 19.5% 电价加价——全球第一份把 AI 数据中心单列出来的分级电价方案。加价的核心逻辑是「AI 数据中心的电力密度是传统工业客户的 8-12 倍，但每兆瓦贡献的日本就业岗位不到传统制造业的 5%」。SoftBank、Preferred Networks、NTT 三家在关西的 AI 数据中心年度电费合计将增加约 428 亿日元。
articles.summary_en: Kansai Electric Power announced at an Osaka press conference on July 11 that starting January 1, 2027, it will apply a 19.5% surcharge to 'AI-specific industrial customers'—the world's first tiered tariff that separates AI data centers from traditional industry. The stated rationale: 'AI data centers have 8-12x the power density of traditional industrial customers, but generate less than 5% of the Japanese jobs per megawatt.' SoftBank, Preferred Networks and NTT's AI data centers in the Kansai region will pay roughly ¥42.8 billion more per year in electricity bills.
articles.content: 日本 7 月 11 日走出了 AI 电价定价的关键一步。关西电力在大阪召开新闻发布会宣布——从 2027 年 1 月 1 日起，对「AI 专用工业客户」征收 19.5% 电价加价。这是全球第一份把 AI 数据中心单列出来的分级工业电价。关西电力社长森望在发布会上给出的核心数据是：其一，AI 数据中心的电力密度（15-25 kW/机架）是传统工业客户（1.5-2.5 kW/工位）的 8-12 倍；其二，每兆瓦 AI 数据中心贡献的日本本地就业岗位不到 15 个，而传统制造业每兆瓦贡献 320 个岗位；其三，AI 数据中心的用电峰值时段与家庭空调峰值重合度高达 78%。这意味着 AI 数据中心在电网最紧张的时刻贡献了最大的负载。关西电力预计——这份加价方案实施后，SoftBank 大阪 480MW 数据中心年度电费将增加 190 亿日元、Preferred Networks 神户 200MW 增加 79 亿日元、NTT 京都 300MW 增加 159 亿日元，三家合计约 428 亿日元。SoftBank 集团 CFO 后藤芳光在同日回应「我们会在 30 天内向经济产业省提出反对意见，同时评估把 AI 训练负载迁移到北海道苫小牧的可能性」。这份「AI 电价分级」很可能在 2027 年被欧洲、韩国、澳大利亚跟进。
articles.content_en: Japan took a pivotal step in AI power pricing on July 11. Kansai Electric Power announced at an Osaka press conference: effective January 1, 2027, 'AI-specific industrial customers' will be charged a 19.5% surcharge—the world's first tiered industrial tariff that isolates AI data centers. President Nozomu Mori laid out the core data: (1) AI data centers' power density (15-25 kW/rack) is 8-12x that of traditional industrial customers (1.5-2.5 kW/workstation); (2) each MW of AI data center generates under 15 local jobs in Japan versus 320 jobs/MW for traditional manufacturing; (3) AI data center peak load overlaps with residential air-conditioning peaks 78% of the time—meaning AI data centers hit the grid hardest exactly when it's most strained. Kansai estimates the surcharge will add ¥19B/year to SoftBank's 480MW Osaka data center, ¥7.9B to Preferred Networks' 200MW in Kobe, and ¥15.9B to NTT's 300MW in Kyoto—totaling ¥42.8B annually. SoftBank Group CFO Yoshimitsu Goto responded the same day: 'We will submit objections to METI within 30 days and evaluate migrating our AI training workloads to Tomakomai, Hokkaido.' This 'tiered AI tariff' is likely to be followed by Europe, Korea and Australia in 2027.
key_points: 关西电力 2027 Q1 起对 AI 专用客户征收 19.5% 电价加价
AI 数据中心电力密度是传统工业的 8-12 倍，本地就业却不足 5%
AI 用电峰值与家庭空调峰值重合度 78%
SoftBank/Preferred Networks/NTT 合计年增 428 亿日元电费
key_points_en: Kansai Electric to apply 19.5% AI-specific surcharge from Q1 2027
AI data center power density 8-12x traditional industry, under 5% of jobs
AI peak load overlaps residential AC peak 78% of the time
SoftBank/Preferred Networks/NTT face ¥42.8B combined annual increase

articles.title: Meta AI 智能眼镜 H1 出货突破 3800 万副，Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 单季销量首超 iPhone 16 Plus
articles.title_en: Meta AI Smart Glasses Ship 38M Units in H1, Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 Outsells iPhone 16 Plus in a Single Quarter
articles.summary: IDC 7 月 11 日发布《全球 AI 智能眼镜 H1 2026 Snapshot》：Meta 上半年出货 3800 万副，Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 单一款单季销量 2100 万副，首次超越 iPhone 16 Plus 单季销量。Ray-Ban 二季度门店销量占 EssilorLuxottica 全球营收 41%——这个从 2023 年只有 3% 的数字，两年半翻了 13.6 倍。Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 由 Meta Llama-Vision 5 提供实时视觉理解，售价 349 美元。
articles.summary_en: IDC's 'Global AI Smart Glasses H1 2026 Snapshot' released July 11: Meta shipped 38M units in H1, with Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 alone hitting 21M in Q2—the first time this model outsold iPhone 16 Plus in a single quarter. Ray-Ban's Q2 store sales accounted for 41% of EssilorLuxottica's global revenue—a figure that was only 3% in 2023, a 13.6x jump in two and a half years. Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 features real-time vision powered by Meta's Llama-Vision 5, priced at $349.
articles.content: AI 智能眼镜第一次实打实地压过 iPhone。IDC 7 月 11 日发布的《全球 AI 智能眼镜 H1 2026 Snapshot》给出三个关键数据：其一，Meta 上半年出货 3800 万副 Ray-Ban Meta 系列，同比 +187%；其二，Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 单一款 Q2 销量 2100 万副，首次超越 iPhone 16 Plus 单季 1970 万副；其三，Ray-Ban 二季度门店销量占 EssilorLuxottica 全球营收 41%——这个数字 2023 年只有 3%，两年半翻了 13.6 倍。Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 的核心 AI 能力由 Meta Llama-Vision 5 提供——支持实时视觉理解、多语言口译、导航覆盖 47 座城市。售价 349 美元，价格锚定在「一副高档 Ray-Ban 太阳镜」的心理价位。IDC 分析师 Ryan Reith 给出的判断是——「AI 智能眼镜是过去 5 年硬件市场的第一次真正的『iPhone 时刻』：它不是新一代硬件，它是一个全新品类的成立」。Meta 内部数据显示，Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 用户日均使用时长 84 分钟，是同期 Apple Vision Pro 的 3.2 倍。
articles.content_en: AI smart glasses finally out-shipped iPhone. IDC's Global AI Smart Glasses H1 2026 Snapshot released July 11 highlights three numbers: (1) Meta shipped 38M Ray-Ban Meta series units in H1, up 187% YoY; (2) Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 alone sold 21M in Q2, beating iPhone 16 Plus's 19.7M for the first time; (3) Ray-Ban Q2 in-store sales accounted for 41% of EssilorLuxottica's global revenue—up from just 3% in 2023, a 13.6x jump in two and a half years. Ray-Ban Meta Gen4's core AI stack is powered by Meta Llama-Vision 5—real-time visual understanding, multi-language interpretation, and navigation covering 47 cities. Priced at $349, it anchors psychologically at 'a high-end pair of Ray-Ban sunglasses'. IDC analyst Ryan Reith's take: 'AI smart glasses are the first real iPhone Moment in hardware in five years—not a new generation of a category, but the establishment of a new category itself'. Meta internal data shows Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 daily usage averages 84 minutes—3.2x Apple Vision Pro over the same window.
key_points: Meta AI 智能眼镜 H1 出货 3800 万副，同比 +187%
Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 Q2 销量首次超越 iPhone 16 Plus
Ray-Ban 二季度门店销量占 EssilorLuxottica 41%，从 2023 年 3% 翻 13.6 倍
Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 用户日均使用 84 分钟，是 Vision Pro 的 3.2 倍
key_points_en: Meta AI smart glasses ship 38M units in H1, +187% YoY
Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 Q2 sales beat iPhone 16 Plus for first time
Ray-Ban Q2 sales hit 41% of EssilorLuxottica revenue, up from 3% in 2023
Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 daily usage 84 min, 3.2x Apple Vision Pro

articles.title: Apple Vision 2 + Apple Intelligence 智能眼镜 9 月新品发布锁死，库克首次公开确认「眼镜是下一代 iPhone」
articles.title_en: Apple Vision 2 + Apple Intelligence Glasses Locked for September Event, Cook First Publicly Confirms 'Glasses Are the Next iPhone'
articles.summary: 彭博社 7 月 11 日独家披露：Apple Vision 2 + 首款 Apple Intelligence 智能眼镜将在 9 月 9 日 iPhone 17 发布会同场亮相。眼镜代号 N401，重量 43 克（远轻于 Vision Pro 的 600 克+），售价 599 美元。库克在同日《华尔街日报》专访中首次公开确认：「眼镜是我们下一代的 iPhone——从 2027 年开始，眼镜业务将是我们最重要的硬件增长引擎」。这是苹果 2007 年 iPhone 时刻以来最激进的品类判断。
articles.summary_en: Bloomberg reported on July 11 that Apple Vision 2 + Apple's first Apple Intelligence glasses will launch alongside iPhone 17 at the September 9 event. Codename N401, weight 43 grams (versus Vision Pro's 600g+), priced at $599. In a same-day Wall Street Journal interview, Tim Cook publicly confirmed for the first time: 'Glasses are our next iPhone—starting in 2027, glasses will be our most important hardware growth engine.' This is Apple's most aggressive category call since the 2007 iPhone moment.
articles.content: 苹果 7 月 11 日把 AI 眼镜的战场公开摊开。彭博社独家披露：Apple Vision 2 + 首款 Apple Intelligence 智能眼镜将在 9 月 9 日 iPhone 17 秋季发布会同场亮相。眼镜代号 N401，重量 43 克（远轻于 Vision Pro 的 600 克+），售价 599 美元，内置 Apple M5 芯片 + 独立 Apple Neural Engine（32 TOPS），支持实时视觉理解、Siri Intelligence 5 语音交互、24 小时电池续航。库克在同日《华尔街日报》专访中首次公开确认——「眼镜是我们下一代的 iPhone。从 2027 年开始，眼镜业务将是我们最重要的硬件增长引擎，我们内部对眼镜业务的 2028 财年出货目标是 6000 万副」。这是苹果自 2007 年 iPhone 时刻以来最激进的一次品类判断。华尔街分析师 Ming-Chi Kuo 给出的预测是——如果 N401 定价 599 美元、且 Siri Intelligence 5 表现达标，苹果 2027 年将出货 1800-2400 万副 AI 智能眼镜，直接对标 Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 与 Gen5。苹果内部代号「Project Sunrise」的下一代真 AR 眼镜（Project Atlas 3）预计 2028 年发布，售价目标锚定 799 美元。
articles.content_en: Apple broke open the AI-glasses war on July 11. Bloomberg exclusively reported: Apple Vision 2 + Apple's first Apple Intelligence glasses will launch at the September 9 iPhone 17 event. Codename N401, weight 43g (versus Vision Pro's 600g+), priced $599, powered by Apple M5 chip + a dedicated Apple Neural Engine (32 TOPS), with real-time visual understanding, Siri Intelligence 5 voice, and 24-hour battery. In a same-day Wall Street Journal interview, Tim Cook publicly confirmed for the first time: 'Glasses are our next iPhone. Starting in 2027, glasses will be our most important hardware growth engine—our internal FY28 ship target is 60M units.' This is Apple's most aggressive category call since the 2007 iPhone moment. Analyst Ming-Chi Kuo predicts that if N401 lands at $599 and Siri Intelligence 5 meets bar, Apple will ship 18-24M AI smart glasses in 2027—directly aimed at Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 and Gen5. The next-gen true-AR glasses (Project Atlas 3, internally 'Project Sunrise') are slated for 2028 at a target $799.

代号 N401，重量 43 克，售价 599 美元，M5 + 32 TOPS NPU

articles.title: 小米 AI 眼镜 Pro 官宣降价至 999 元，「AI 眼镜千元时代」直接冲击 Meta 与苹果双极格局
articles.title_en: Xiaomi AI Glasses Pro Drops to ¥999, Ushering In 'AI Glasses Under 1,000' Era and Cracking the Meta-Apple Duopoly
articles.summary: 小米 7 月 11 日在雷军微博官宣：小米 AI 眼镜 Pro 正式降价至 999 元（约 138 美元），比原定 1799 元下调 44%。同款配备骁龙 AR3 Gen1 芯片 + 小米妙想 AI 大模型 3，支持实时视觉理解、37 种语言口译。降价 6 小时内京东下单破 87 万台，直接把 AI 智能眼镜从「奢侈品」拉到「消费电子」价位。小米内部目标：2026 年 H2 出货 1500 万副 AI 眼镜，冲击全球第三大 AI 眼镜厂商。
articles.summary_en: Xiaomi announced on Lei Jun's Weibo on July 11: Xiaomi AI Glasses Pro drops to ¥999 (~$138), a 44% cut from the ¥1,799 launch price. The model runs on Snapdragon AR3 Gen1 and Xiaomi Miaoxiang AI Model 3, with real-time visual understanding and interpretation across 37 languages. JD.com pre-orders topped 870,000 units within 6 hours, pulling AI smart glasses from 'luxury' into consumer-electronics territory. Xiaomi's internal H2 target: 15M units, aiming to become the world's third-largest AI glasses maker.
articles.content: 小米 7 月 11 日出手改写 AI 智能眼镜的价格锚。雷军微博官宣——小米 AI 眼镜 Pro 官方降价至 999 元（约 138 美元），比原定 1799 元下调 44%。同款配备高通骁龙 AR3 Gen1 芯片 + 小米妙想 AI 大模型 3，支持实时视觉理解、37 种语言口译、5 米内手势识别、8 小时续航。京东、天猫下单 6 小时破 87 万台，短短一天从「AI 眼镜奢侈品」拉到「消费电子」价位。Ray-Ban Meta Gen4 的 349 美元原本被市场定义为「AI 眼镜的价格底线」——小米直接把这个底线打穿了 60%。小米内部目标：2026 年 H2 出货 1500 万副 AI 眼镜，全年出货 2200 万副，冲击全球第三大 AI 眼镜厂商（前二仍是 Meta 与苹果）。IDC 中国分析师王吉平的判断是——「小米降价 6 小时京东破 87 万台，是 AI 硬件在中国市场第一次达到『iPhone 4 上市』级别的销售速度」。这份定价把 Meta 逼到「Ray-Ban 定位守 349 美元 + 通用款下探 199 美元」的双档策略。
articles.content_en: Xiaomi rewrote the AI-glasses price anchor on July 11. Lei Jun's Weibo announced: Xiaomi AI Glasses Pro drops to ¥999 (~$138), 44% below the ¥1,799 launch price. It runs on Snapdragon AR3 Gen1 + Xiaomi Miaoxiang AI Model 3, with real-time visual understanding, 37-language interpretation, 5-meter gesture recognition and 8-hour battery. JD.com and Tmall preorders topped 870,000 units in 6 hours, pulling AI glasses from luxury to consumer electronics territory overnight. Ray-Ban Meta Gen4's $349 had been the market's presumed 'floor for AI glasses'—Xiaomi punched 60% below that floor. Xiaomi's internal H2 target: 15M units; full-year 22M, aiming for the world's #3 AI glasses maker after Meta and Apple. IDC China analyst Wang Jiping: 'Xiaomi's 6-hour 870K JD sell-through is the first time AI hardware has hit iPhone-4-launch-level velocity in China.' This price now forces Meta into a two-tier response—hold Ray-Ban at $349 while pushing a generic model down to $199.

articles.title: Perplexity 完成 25 亿美元 F 轮融资，估值飙至 250 亿美元——Aravind Srinivas 「AI 搜索的第二次机会」被市场买单
articles.title_en: Perplexity Raises $2.5B Series F at $25B Valuation—Market Signs Off on Aravind Srinivas's 'AI Search Second Chance'
articles.summary: Perplexity 7 月 11 日宣布完成 25 亿美元 F 轮融资，估值从 3 月的 140 亿飙升至 250 亿美元，4 个月翻 78%。IVP 领投，NVIDIA、SoftBank Vision Fund 3、Jeff Bezos、Nat Friedman、Elad Gil 跟投。Perplexity 2026 年 6 月 MAU 突破 2.1 亿，年化收入 4.8 亿美元——被 The Information 称为「AI 搜索赛道过去 12 个月第一个真正的商业化胜者」。
articles.summary_en: Perplexity announced a $2.5B Series F on July 11 at a $25B valuation, up 78% from March's $14B. IVP led with NVIDIA, SoftBank Vision Fund 3, Jeff Bezos, Nat Friedman and Elad Gil participating. Perplexity's MAU hit 210M in June 2026 with an annualized revenue run-rate of $480M—The Information calls it 'the first true commercialization winner in the AI search race in the past 12 months.'
articles.content: Perplexity 完成了它成立 4 年以来最重要的一次融资。7 月 11 日官宣：25 亿美元 F 轮融资完成，投后估值 250 亿美元，从 3 月的 140 亿翻了 78%。领投方 IVP，跟投包括 NVIDIA、SoftBank Vision Fund 3、Jeff Bezos、Nat Friedman、Elad Gil、Amex Ventures。Perplexity 2026 年 6 月 MAU 达 2.1 亿，付费订阅用户 620 万（Comet Pro $20/月 + Perplexity Enterprise），年化收入 4.8 亿美元——从 2024 年的 2000 万到 2026 年 6 月的 4.8 亿，24 个月增长 24 倍。The Information 记者 Aaron Holmes 给出的判断是——「Perplexity 是过去 12 个月 AI 搜索赛道第一个真正的商业化胜者。SearchGPT、Google AI Overviews 的收入还依赖于原有广告基座，Perplexity 是从零开始把 AI 搜索做成独立付费产品」。Aravind Srinivas 在同日给员工的全员信中写：「我们完成 F 轮融资的三条使命——第一，Comet 浏览器 Pro 用户从 620 万涨到 5000 万；第二，Enterprise 客户从当前 4200 家扩到 25000 家；第三，未来 18 个月，AI 搜索的市场份额从当前 6% 冲到 15%」。这份野心第一次让 Google 感到了「AI 搜索被挑战」的正面威胁。
articles.content_en: Perplexity closed the most important round in its four-year history. On July 11: $2.5B Series F, post-money $25B, up 78% from $14B in March. IVP led; participants include NVIDIA, SoftBank Vision Fund 3, Jeff Bezos, Nat Friedman, Elad Gil and Amex Ventures. Perplexity's June 2026 MAU: 210M; paid subscribers 6.2M (Comet Pro $20/month + Perplexity Enterprise); ARR $480M—a 24x jump from $20M in 2024. The Information's Aaron Holmes: 'Perplexity is the first true commercialization winner in the AI search race in the past 12 months. SearchGPT's and Google AI Overviews' revenue still rides existing ad bases—Perplexity built AI search as a standalone paid product from zero.' In an all-hands email the same day, Aravind Srinivas laid out three F-round missions: (1) Comet browser Pro users from 6.2M to 50M; (2) Enterprise clients from 4,200 to 25,000; (3) AI search market share from 6% to 15% within 18 months. This is the first time Google has felt AI search as a direct threat.
key_points: Perplexity F 轮 25 亿美元融资，估值飙至 250 亿
IVP 领投，NVIDIA/SoftBank/Bezos/Nat Friedman 跟投
6 月 MAU 2.1 亿，年化收入 4.8 亿美元，24 个月增长 24 倍
Aravind Srinivas 目标 18 个月内 AI 搜索份额从 6% 冲到 15%

IVP leads; NVIDIA/SoftBank/Bezos/Nat Friedman follow
June MAU 210M, ARR $480M—24x growth in 24 months
Srinivas targets 6% → 15% AI search share in 18 months

articles.title: Aravind Srinivas 对 Google AI Overviews 发起「产品级反击」：Comet 2.0 推出「反 AI Overviews」显式引用模式
articles.title_en: Aravind Srinivas Launches 'Product-Level Counter' Against Google AI Overviews: Comet 2.0 Ships Explicit-Citation Mode
articles.summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas 7 月 11 日发布 Comet 浏览器 2.0，同时推出「反 AI Overviews」显式引用模式——用户搜索时不但看到 AI 摘要，还看到「哪句话来自哪个网页 + 引用密度百分比 + 原文作者贡献指数」。这是对 Google AI Overviews 长期「稀释原文引用」策略的正面反击。Aravind 在 X 上写：「AI 搜索的信任度 = 引用的透明度」，一句话把 Google 的 AI 搜索路线拉进了辩论。
articles.summary_en: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas released Comet Browser 2.0 on July 11 with an 'Anti-AI-Overviews' explicit-citation mode: every AI answer includes 'which sentence from which page + citation density % + original-author contribution index'—a direct hit on Google AI Overviews' pattern of diluting citations. Srinivas posted on X: 'Trust in AI search = transparency of citation', pulling Google's AI-search route into a public debate.
articles.content: Perplexity 与 Google 的 AI 搜索路线之争 7 月 11 日全面公开化。Aravind Srinivas 发布 Comet 浏览器 2.0，核心升级是「反 AI Overviews」显式引用模式（Explicit Citation Mode）——用户搜索时不但看到 AI 摘要，还看到三个新指标：其一，摘要中每一句话对应哪一个原网页（点击可跳转到原文原段落）；其二，引用密度百分比（比如「本次答复 72% 内容来自 The Verge、18% 来自 Ars Technica、10% 来自 Reuters」）；其三，原文作者贡献指数（每位作者在答复中贡献的字数比例）。这是对 Google AI Overviews 长期被指控「稀释原文引用、导致原网页流量暴跌」的正面反击。Aravind 在 X 上写：「AI 搜索的信任度 = 引用的透明度。Comet 2.0 让我们的用户永远知道『我读到的这句话是谁写的』」。这条推文 24 小时转发量 12 万次，被 The Verge、Wired、Fast Company 集体报道。Google AI 搜索业务副总裁 Elizabeth Reid 在同日回应「Google 一直在优化 AI Overviews 的引用体验，我们不接受『Google 稀释引用』的说法」——但这份声明被业内解读为「防御性回应」。Comet 2.0 上线 24 小时内下载量突破 87 万，Comet Pro 订阅新增 3.2 万。
articles.content_en: The Perplexity-vs-Google AI-search route dispute went public on July 11. Aravind Srinivas released Comet Browser 2.0 with an Explicit Citation Mode as the core upgrade: every AI answer surfaces three new signals: (1) each sentence maps to the exact source page (click-through to the original paragraph); (2) a citation density percentage (e.g., '72% from The Verge, 18% from Ars Technica, 10% from Reuters'); (3) an original-author contribution index (each author's word-share in the answer). This is a direct counter to Google AI Overviews, long accused of 'diluting citations and collapsing source-site traffic'. Srinivas on X: 'Trust in AI search = transparency of citation. Comet 2.0 makes sure our users always know who wrote the sentence they're reading.' The tweet drew 120K retweets in 24 hours and coverage from The Verge, Wired, and Fast Company. Google's VP of AI Search, Elizabeth Reid, responded the same day: 'Google has continuously improved citation experience in AI Overviews. We reject the framing that Google dilutes citations.' The statement is widely read as defensive. Comet 2.0 downloads passed 870K in 24 hours; Comet Pro added 32K subscribers.
key_points: Perplexity Comet 2.0 推出「反 AI Overviews」显式引用模式
三大新指标：句子级溯源、引用密度百分比、作者贡献指数

上线 24 小时下载破 87 万，Pro 订阅新增 3.2 万
key_points_en: Perplexity Comet 2.0 ships 'Anti-AI-Overviews' Explicit Citation Mode
Three new signals: sentence-level sourcing, citation density %, author contribution index
Srinivas's 'Trust in AI search = transparency of citation' hits 120K retweets in 24h
870K downloads and 32K new Pro subs in 24 hours

articles.title: Cohere 开源 Command R++ 380B：企业级检索模型第一次撞穿闭源天花板
articles.title_en: Cohere Open-Sources Command R++ 380B: The First Time an Enterprise Retrieval Model Punches Through the Closed-Source Ceiling
articles.summary: Cohere 7 月 11 日在 HuggingFace 开源 Command R++ 380B——一个专为企业检索增强场景（RAG）优化的 380B 参数模型。在 EnterpriseRAG-Bench 上，Command R++ 得分 82.3，超过 GPT-5.6（79.1）与 Claude Opus 4.1（80.6），成为该基准第一个「开源模型登顶」。开源协议为 Cohere Enterprise Open License（商用需 500 万美元/年上限之上付费），是 2026 年最重要的一次开源发布。
articles.summary_en: Cohere open-sourced Command R++ 380B on HuggingFace on July 11—a 380B-parameter model tuned specifically for enterprise retrieval-augmented (RAG) workloads. On EnterpriseRAG-Bench, Command R++ scored 82.3, beating GPT-5.6 (79.1) and Claude Opus 4.1 (80.6)—the first time an open-source model tops this benchmark. License: Cohere Enterprise Open License (paid above a $5M/year revenue cap). This is the most consequential open-source release of 2026.
articles.content: Cohere 7 月 11 日在 HuggingFace 上开源了 Command R++ 380B——一个专为企业检索增强（RAG）场景优化的 380B 参数模型。在 EnterpriseRAG-Bench（企业 RAG 场景基准）上，Command R++ 得分 82.3，超过 GPT-5.6（79.1）与 Claude Opus 4.1（80.6），成为该基准第一个「开源模型登顶」——这是过去 24 个月企业检索增强赛道从未出现过的一次事件。Command R++ 的架构核心是「多跳注意力 + 引用溯源固化」（Multi-Hop Attention with Citation Anchoring）——在推理过程中，模型不但生成答案，还生成每一步答案的原文档段落映射。开源协议为 Cohere Enterprise Open License——非商用完全免费，商用需在 500 万美元/年营收上限之上向 Cohere 支付授权费，这是介于 Meta Llama 商业条款与 OpenAI 完全闭源之间的中间路径。Cohere CEO Aidan Gomez 在同日给员工的信中写：「Command R++ 380B 是我们 4 年来最重要的一次发布——它证明企业级检索能力不需要绑定在闭源 API 上」。Cohere 股东里 Nvidia、SAP、Salesforce Ventures 都以「战略投资者」而非「财务投资者」身份签字同意开源发布，说明这份开源已经不是「小厂拉声量」的动作。
articles.content_en: Cohere open-sourced Command R++ 380B on HuggingFace on July 11—a 380B-parameter model tuned for enterprise retrieval-augmented (RAG) workloads. On EnterpriseRAG-Bench, Command R++ scored 82.3, beating GPT-5.6 (79.1) and Claude Opus 4.1 (80.6)—the first time an open-source model tops the enterprise RAG leaderboard in 24 months. Architecturally, Command R++ centers on Multi-Hop Attention with Citation Anchoring—during inference, the model produces the answer plus a step-by-step mapping to source paragraphs. License: Cohere Enterprise Open License—free for non-commercial use, paid to Cohere for commercial use above $5M annual revenue. This sits between Meta Llama's commercial terms and OpenAI's full-closed—a middle path. CEO Aidan Gomez in an all-hands email: 'Command R++ 380B is our most important release in four years. It proves enterprise-grade retrieval doesn't have to be locked behind closed APIs.' Cohere's investors—Nvidia, SAP, Salesforce Ventures—signed off on the open-source release as strategic (not financial) shareholders, signaling this is more than a 'small-lab hype play'.
key_points: Cohere 开源 Command R++ 380B，EnterpriseRAG-Bench 首次开源登顶
得分 82.3 超过 GPT-5.6（79.1）与 Claude Opus 4.1（80.6）
架构核心：多跳注意力 + 引用溯源固化
开源协议：500 万美元营收上限之下免费，之上需授权
key_points_en: Cohere open-sources Command R++ 380B, first open-source top on EnterpriseRAG-Bench
Score 82.3 beats GPT-5.6 (79.1) and Claude Opus 4.1 (80.6)
Architecture: Multi-Hop Attention with Citation Anchoring
License: free under $5M ARR, paid Cohere license above

articles.title: Atlassian、Adobe、Amazon 相继下架员工「旗舰 AI 模型」使用权，企业 AI 成本控制潮全面到来
articles.title_en: Atlassian, Adobe, Amazon Pull Flagship AI Models from Employee Access as Enterprise Cost Crackdown Goes Mainstream
articles.summary: AI Base 7 月 10 日披露：Atlassian、Adobe、Amazon 集体禁用员工调用 Claude Opus 4.1、GPT-5.6 等旗舰模型，强制切换 Haiku 4.5、GPT-5.6-mini 等低价替代。触发点是三家厂商在 Q2 悄然从「年费 seats」切换到「按调用付费」——单员工月账单从 60 美元冲到 400 美元，财务部门集体报警。
articles.summary_en: AiBase reported on July 10: Atlassian, Adobe and Amazon are collectively blocking employees from calling flagship AI models like Claude Opus 4.1 and GPT-5.6, forcing a switch to cheaper alternatives like Haiku 4.5 and GPT-5.6-mini. The trigger: all three vendors quietly pivoted in Q2 from annual seat licenses to pay-per-call billing, driving per-employee monthly invoices from $60 to $400 and setting off alarms across CFO offices.
articles.content: 「旗舰模型禁令」在 7 月 10 日成为硅谷 CIO 的第一波关键词。Atlassian、Adobe、Amazon 三家企业内部 IT 组通过全员邮件明确：员工不再被允许通过公司账号调用 Claude Opus 4.1（105 美元/百万输入 tokens）、GPT-5.6（80 美元/百万输入 tokens）等旗舰款，一律降级到 Haiku 4.5（3.9 美元）或 GPT-5.6-mini（1.2 美元）。触发点极为一致：三家 AI 厂商在 Q2 均从「固定年费/席位」切换到「按调用付费」，单员工月账单从最初的 60 美元冲到 400 美元。财务复盘发现，工程师只是让 Cursor / Copilot 后台默认走了 Opus，实际使用效果与 Haiku 差异不到 8%，但账单差异 25 倍。这份「性能溢价 = 成本黑洞」的鲜明对比，正在推动整个企业 AI 支出结构快速重构。
articles.content_en: The 'flagship-model ban' became CIO shorthand across Silicon Valley on July 10. Internal IT teams at Atlassian, Adobe and Amazon issued all-hands emails stipulating that employees can no longer call Claude Opus 4.1 ($105 per million input tokens) or GPT-5.6 ($80) via corporate accounts—everything routes to Haiku 4.5 ($3.9) or GPT-5.6-mini ($1.2). The trigger is identical across the three vendors: in Q2 they all pivoted from fixed annual seat licenses to pay-per-call billing, and per-employee monthly bills spiked from $60 to $400. Post-mortem: engineers simply let Cursor and Copilot default to Opus, with the actual quality delta versus Haiku under 8% but the bill 25x higher. This 'performance premium = cost black hole' contrast is rapidly reshaping enterprise AI spend.
key_points: Atlassian、Adobe、Amazon 三家同步禁用旗舰模型内部调用
触发点是 Q2 从「年费 seats」切换到「按调用付费」
单员工月账单从 60 美元冲到 400 美元
Haiku 4.5 vs Opus 4.1 效果差异不到 8%，账单差异 25 倍
key_points_en: Atlassian, Adobe and Amazon simultaneously block internal calls to flagship models
Trigger: Q2 pivot from annual seat licenses to pay-per-call billing
Per-employee monthly bills spiked from $60 to $400
Haiku 4.5 vs Opus 4.1 quality delta under 8%, bill delta 25x

articles.title: Anthropic 企业市场份额首次超越 OpenAI，出口管制反成「稀缺性溢价」
articles.title_en: Anthropic's Enterprise Share Surpasses OpenAI for First Time, US Export Controls Ironically Become 'Scarcity Premium'
articles.summary: IDC + Gartner 7 月 7 日联合数据：Anthropic 在美国企业 AI 市场的份额首次超越 OpenAI（32% vs 28%）。反直觉的是——尽管 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 被特朗普政府强制下架海外，「供应链风险」的官方定性反而在企业客户端强化了 Claude 的「政府可控」形象，年框合同 6 月至 7 月环比 +41%。
articles.summary_en: Joint IDC + Gartner data on July 7: Anthropic's US enterprise AI market share surpassed OpenAI for the first time (32% vs 28%). Counter-intuitively, even though Fable 5 and Mythos 5 were force-pulled from foreign users by the Trump administration, the official 'supply chain risk' framing has strengthened Claude's 'government-approved' image in the enterprise, driving year-frame contracts up 41% month-over-month.
articles.content: Anthropic 完成了一次极不寻常的市场超越——出口管制不但没有削弱它，反而在企业客户中成为「稀缺性护城河」。IDC 与 Gartner 7 月 7 日联合发布的《Enterprise AI Q2 Snapshot》显示，Anthropic 在美国企业市场（Fortune 2000）份额已达 32%，首次超过 OpenAI 的 28%——两年前这个数字是 8% vs 61%。加速因素有三：其一，Claude Fable 5 在编程与长上下文推理上口碑压倒 GPT-5.6；其二，Trump 政府 6 月强制 Anthropic 下架 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 海外访问，「政府亲手可控」被大企业理解为「合规优先候选」；其三，加州州长 Newsom 6 月 30 日与 Anthropic 签下「州政府 50% 折扣」协议，成为公部门跟进的强锚点。
articles.content_en: Anthropic just executed a highly unusual market reversal—US export controls, rather than weakening it, have become a 'scarcity moat' among enterprise buyers. IDC and Gartner's joint 'Enterprise AI Q2 Snapshot' released on July 7 puts Anthropic's Fortune 2000 share at 32%, edging past OpenAI's 28% for the first time—two years ago the ratio was 8% vs 61%. Three accelerants: (1) Claude Fable 5's programming and long-context reasoning have overtaken GPT-5.6 in enterprise trials; (2) the Trump administration's June order to pull Fable 5 / Mythos 5 from foreign users has been read by big buyers as 'government-approved—compliance-first'; (3) California Governor Newsom's June 30 deal granting state agencies a 50% Claude discount is anchoring public-sector uptake.
key_points: Anthropic 美国企业市场份额 32%，首次超越 OpenAI 的 28%
两年前份额比是 8% vs 61%——两年差距完全翻转
出口管制被解读为「政府可控」，反而强化 B 端信任
加州州府 50% 折扣协议成为公部门跟进锚点
key_points_en: Anthropic US enterprise share hits 32%, edging past OpenAI's 28%
Two years ago the ratio was 8% vs 61%—complete reversal
Export controls reframed as 'government-approved', boosting enterprise trust
California 50% state discount deal anchoring public-sector adoption

articles.title: 纽约时报牵头 17 家媒体申请制裁 OpenAI，2000 万条对话日志「消失」成核心争议
articles.title_en: NYT-Led Coalition of 17 News Organizations Seeks Sanctions Against OpenAI, 20 Million 'Deleted' Chat Logs at Core of Dispute
articles.summary: 7 月 9 日纽约南区联邦地方法院：由《纽约时报》牵头的 17 家新闻机构联合提交制裁动议，指控 OpenAI 在版权诉讼中「藏匿证据、就技术能力做虚假陈述」，2000 万条本可证明侵权的 ChatGPT 输出日志「未被妥善保存或已被删除」。若制裁通过，法官可推定「被删除内容对 OpenAI 不利」，将实质改变案件走向。
articles.summary_en: On July 9 at the Southern District of New York, a coalition of 17 news organizations led by The New York Times filed a motion seeking sanctions against OpenAI in the ongoing copyright case, alleging the company 'concealed evidence and misrepresented its technical capabilities', with roughly 20 million ChatGPT output logs that could prove infringement 'not preserved or already deleted'. If granted, the court can instruct the jury to assume the missing evidence was unfavorable to OpenAI—a shift that could materially alter the trajectory of the case.
articles.content: 版权诉讼第一次向 OpenAI 亮出「毁灭证据」这张最重的牌。17 家新闻机构（含 NYT、纽约每日新闻、芝加哥论坛报）7 月 9 日向法院提交动议：其一，OpenAI 长达两年声称「无法在训练数据集中搜索受版权保护内容」，事实上具备这一能力却未披露；其二，约 2000 万条本可证明模型「复现或高度模仿」新闻文章的 ChatGPT 输出日志「未妥善保存或已被删除」。请求包括金钱制裁 + 律师费 + 「不利推定」——后者一旦获批，联邦法官可直接向陪审团指示「假定被删除内容对 OpenAI 不利」。案件核心版权主张已在 2025 年通过驳回动议，进入证据开示阶段。同一动议不针对微软（Co-defendant）。
articles.content_en: The copyright litigation just escalated to the heaviest card of all—evidence destruction. On July 9, a coalition of 17 news outlets (including NYT, New York Daily News, Chicago Tribune) filed with the court alleging: (1) OpenAI spent two years claiming it 'could not search training datasets for copyrighted material' when in fact it possessed the capability but never disclosed it; (2) roughly 20 million ChatGPT output logs that could prove the models 'reproduced or closely mimicked' news articles were 'not preserved or already deleted'. Relief sought includes monetary sanctions, attorneys' fees, and 'adverse inference'—the last, if granted, would let the federal judge instruct the jury to 'assume the missing content was unfavorable to OpenAI'. Core copyright claims survived motions to dismiss in 2025 and are now in discovery. This motion does not target Microsoft, the co-defendant.
key_points: 17 家新闻机构联合提交制裁动议，NYT 牵头
指控 OpenAI 隐瞒可搜索训练数据的技术能力两年之久
约 2000 万条 ChatGPT 输出日志「未妥善保存或已被删除」
「不利推定」若获批，将实质改变陪审团走向
key_points_en: 17 news organizations file joint sanctions motion, led by NYT
Alleges OpenAI concealed searchable-training-data capability for two years
Roughly 20 million ChatGPT output logs 'not preserved or already deleted'
'Adverse inference' if granted would materially alter jury trajectory

articles.title: Meta「牛油果」Avocado 推迟到 2026 Q1，Llama 开源时代或提前落幕
articles.title_en: Meta's 'Avocado' Successor Delayed to Q1 2026, Llama Open-Source Era May End Prematurely
articles.summary: 36 氪 7 月 11 日报道：Meta 原计划年底发布的下一代前沿模型 Avocado 已被推迟至 2026 Q1，且更倾向以闭源形式推出。这意味着自 2023 年 Llama 系列以来的开源路线正面临逆转，Meta 官方虽坚称「按计划推进」，多位匿名工程师指出训练稳定性与推理泛化尚未达到商用层级。
articles.summary_en: Reported by 36Kr on July 11: Meta's next-generation frontier model 'Avocado', originally scheduled for year-end, has been pushed to Q1 2026 and increasingly leans toward a closed-source release. This signals a reversal of the open-source path Meta has walked since Llama debuted in 2023. Official comms insist 'training is on schedule', but multiple anonymous engineers say stability and inference generalization have not yet reached commercial grade.
articles.content: Avocado 的延期只是表象——真正的变化发生在 Meta AI 战略的最底层。Llama 4 反响平淡、Llama 架构被外部大规模复刻（含 DeepSeek R1 采用类 Llama 架构）后，扎克伯格于 2025 年夏天开始公开暗示「必须严格减轻风险」。7 月 11 日 36 氪最新披露：Avocado 训练目标从「开源标杆」重构为「闭源商用旗舰」，权重不再自由下载；配套动作包括 143 亿美元收购 Scale AI 拿下 Alexandr Wang 领衔的 MSL 实验室、Prometheus 超大规模数据中心加速建设、下一代自研 ASIC 推理芯片提前量产。这不是普通的战略微调——是继 2012 年拥抱移动互联网、2020 年押注元宇宙之后 Meta 的「第三次战略大迁徙」。
articles.content_en: The Avocado delay is only a surface signal—the real shift is happening at the deepest layer of Meta's AI strategy. After a lukewarm Llama 4 reception and external labs (including DeepSeek R1) reproducing the Llama architecture at scale, Zuckerberg began publicly hinting since summer 2025 that Meta 'must rigorously reduce risk'. 36Kr on July 11: Avocado's training target has been reframed from 'open-source benchmark' to 'closed-source commercial flagship', with weights no longer freely downloadable. Companion moves: a $14.3B Scale AI acquisition installing Alexandr Wang's MSL lab in the AI decision core, accelerated build-out of the Prometheus hyperscale data center, and next-generation in-house ASIC inference silicon pulled forward. This is not a routine strategy tweak—it is Meta's third grand migration after embracing mobile in 2012 and betting on the metaverse in 2020.
key_points: Avocado 从年底推迟到 2026 Q1，倾向闭源发布
Llama 开源路线可能就此中断，Yann LeCun 已宣布离职创业
143 亿美元收购 Scale AI 换来 Alexandr Wang 领衔 MSL
Prometheus 数据中心 + 自研 ASIC 芯片同步加速
key_points_en: Avocado slips from year-end to Q1 2026, closed-source pivot leans in
Llama open-source path may end; Yann LeCun announces departure to start his own venture
$14.3B Scale AI acquisition installs Alexandr Wang as MSL lead
Prometheus data center and in-house ASIC inference chip both accelerate

articles.title: 英国 10 亿英镑「本土 AI 芯片战」启动，阻止创业公司搬迁美国
articles.title_en: UK Launches £1B 'Sovereign AI Chip War' to Stop Startups Moving to US
articles.summary: 7 月 10 日 London Tech Week 上，英国科技大臣 Liz Kendall 宣布 10 亿英镑本土 AI 芯片与半导体设备直接采购计划，核心目标是「阻止英国 AI 创业公司为了算力搬迁到美国」。
articles.summary_en: At London Tech Week on July 10, UK Technology Secretary Liz Kendall announced a £1B direct procurement plan for domestic AI chips and semiconductor equipment, aimed squarely at 'stopping UK AI startups from moving to the US in search of compute'.
articles.content: 英国政府这次的动作足够直接——10 亿英镑不做补贴、不做减税，而是直接下场当买家。Liz Kendall 在 London Tech Week 主旨演讲中说：「过去 24 个月我们看着 Wayve、Isomorphic Labs、ARM Neoverse 的关键项目一个个把重心搬到美国，主要原因只有一个：算力买不到、买不起。」这份 10 亿英镑的采购包，将优先购买 Graphcore、Nvidia UK 供货、Google TPU 与 AMD MI400 系列，并向英国 AI 创业公司提供 3-6 年长期算力租约。业内解读：这是继欧盟《AI 法案》生效之后，欧洲第一份「主权算力」清晰行动方案，与法国《勇敢拥抱 AI》100% 大企业 AI 应用目标一起，构成 2026 年欧洲 AI 战略的双轮驱动。
articles.content_en: The UK's move is unusually direct—£1B not for subsidies or tax breaks, but for the government to become the buyer. Kendall's London Tech Week keynote: 'Over the past 24 months, we have watched Wayve, Isomorphic Labs and ARM Neoverse's key projects relocate to the US, and the reason is one thing only: compute either cannot be bought or cannot be afforded.' The £1B package will prioritize procurement from Graphcore, Nvidia UK, Google TPU and AMD MI400, and offer 3–6 year long-term compute leases to UK AI startups. Analyst read: this is the first concrete 'sovereign compute' action plan in Europe after the EU AI Act took effect, pairing with France's 'Brave Embrace of AI' 100%-enterprise-AI-adoption target to form a dual engine of European AI strategy for 2026.
key_points: 英国政府 10 亿英镑直接下场买芯片
核心目标是阻止本土 AI 创业公司搬迁美国
向创业公司提供 3-6 年长期算力租约
配合欧盟《AI 法案》构成欧洲主权算力双轮驱动
key_points_en: UK government commits £1B direct chip procurement
Core goal: prevent domestic AI startups from relocating to the US
3–6 year long-term compute leases for startups
Pairs with EU AI Act to form Europe's sovereign-compute dual engine

articles.title: 微软 2025 年碳排放暴涨 25%，AI 数据中心把「2030 负碳承诺」逼到悬崖
articles.title_en: Microsoft's 2025 Emissions Surge 25%, AI Data Centers Push '2030 Net-Negative' Pledge to the Cliff Edge
articles.summary: 微软 7 月 9 日发布可持续发展年报：2025 年公司范围二排放量从 1600 万吨飙升到 2000 万吨 CO2e（+25%），主因是 AI 训练/推理数据中心密集扩容 + 部分可再生能源信用额度暂停采购。西德州新建的天然气电厂已被环保组织点名。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft's July 9 sustainability annual report: 2025 Scope-2 emissions surged from 16M to 20M metric tons CO2e (+25%), driven by explosive AI training/inference data-center expansion plus a pause on certain renewable-energy credit purchases. The new natural-gas plant in West Texas is already named by environmental groups.
articles.source: The Daily News Now / Microsoft ESG
articles.source_en: The Daily News Now / Microsoft ESG
articles.content: 微软的「2030 年负碳」承诺是过去五年硅谷 ESG 叙事的头号招牌，如今被 AI 自己亲手打了折。7 月 9 日发布的可持续发展报告显示：2025 年公司排放同比 +25%——从 1600 万吨飙升到 2000 万吨 CO2e。数据中心的爆炸性增长是主因，但更微妙的是——微软主动承认「暂停采购一部分可再生能源信用额度」是排放上涨的重要原因，意味着公司在「补偿式脱碳」策略上主动收缩。西德州新建的天然气电厂给微软带来了额外的即时电力，但也让 2030 年净负碳承诺面临不到 5 年的兑现窗口。这份年报某种意义上是硅谷 AI 与 ESG 之间「宿命性冲突」的第一次公开摊牌。
articles.content_en: Microsoft's '2030 net-negative' pledge has been the flagship ESG narrative in Silicon Valley for five years—AI has now knocked a discount off it. The July 9 sustainability report: 2025 emissions up 25% YoY, from 16M to 20M metric tons CO2e. Data-center explosion is the primary driver, but more subtle: Microsoft explicitly conceded that 'pausing purchases of certain renewable-energy credits' contributed materially—signaling active retreat from an 'offset-first' decarbonization strategy. The new West Texas natural-gas plant brings incremental immediate power, but also compresses the 2030 net-negative promise to a sub-five-year window. This annual report is, in a sense, the first public reckoning of the fated conflict between AI and ESG in Silicon Valley.
key_points: 微软 2025 年 CO2 排放 +25%，从 1600 万吨到 2000 万吨
AI 数据中心密集扩容是首要驱动
主动暂停采购部分可再生能源信用额度
2030 年净负碳承诺兑现窗口不到 5 年
key_points_en: Microsoft 2025 CO2 emissions +25%, from 16M to 20M metric tons
Explosive AI data-center expansion is primary driver
Actively paused purchases of certain renewable-energy credits
Sub-five-year window remaining on 2030 net-negative pledge

articles.title: 阶跃星辰 Step 3 定档 7 月 31 日全球开源，首个原生多模态 MoE 推理旗舰
articles.title_en: Stepfun's Step 3 Set for Global Open-Source Release on July 31, First Native Multimodal MoE Reasoning Flagship
articles.summary: 阶跃星辰 7 月 10 日官宣：新一代基础大模型 Step 3——首个「全尺寸、原生多模态、MoE 架构」推理旗舰将于 7 月 31 日面向全球企业与开发者开源。上下文长度 128K，专家总量 1024，激活参数 780 亿。
articles.summary_en: Stepfun announced on July 10: Step 3—its next-generation foundation model and first 'full-size, natively multimodal, MoE-architecture' reasoning flagship—will be open-sourced worldwide to enterprises and developers on July 31. Context length 128K, 1024 total experts, 78B activated parameters.
articles.source: 阶跃星辰官方 / 界面新闻
articles.content: Step 3 的技术亮点被外界迅速拆解：MoE 架构 1024 专家 / 单次激活 780 亿参数，等于「大模型体量、小模型推理成本」；原生多模态意味着文本、图像、视频、音频四路输入在预训练阶段就已耦合，而非事后拼接；128K 上下文窗口对齐 Kimi K3 与 Claude Fable 5。开源许可采用 Apache 2.0——比 Kimi K3 的 MIT 稍严格，但商用无附加条款。中国大模型开源阵营在 7 月正在集中释放：快手 Auto Think（7 月 11 日）、Kimi K3（7 月 10 日）、Step 3（7 月 31 日）、上海 AI 实验室 Intern-S1（7 月 29 日），一个月内四款重量级开源模型密集上线。
articles.content_en: Step 3's technical highlights are already being dissected: MoE architecture with 1024 experts and 78B activated parameters per pass equals 'large-model capability at small-model inference cost'. Native multimodality means text/image/video/audio inputs are coupled at pre-training rather than glued on afterward. The 128K context window aligns with Kimi K3 and Claude Fable 5. Open-source license: Apache 2.0—slightly stricter than Kimi K3's MIT but with no commercial add-ons. China's open-source LLM bloc is releasing intensively this month: Kuaishou Auto Think (July 11), Kimi K3 (July 10), Step 3 (July 31), Shanghai AI Lab Intern-S1 (July 29)—four heavyweight open-source models landing within thirty days.
key_points: Step 3 于 7 月 31 日全球开源，Apache 2.0 许可
MoE 架构 1024 专家 / 780 亿激活参数
原生多模态四路输入预训练阶段耦合
中国开源阵营一个月内密集释放 4 款重量级模型
key_points_en: Step 3 open-sourced worldwide July 31 under Apache 2.0
MoE with 1024 experts / 78B activated parameters
Native multimodality: four-input coupling at pre-training
Four heavyweight Chinese open-source models within one month

articles.title: RealSense 从英特尔剥离，5000 万美元融资押注「Physical AI 视觉」
articles.title_en: RealSense Completes Spinout from Intel, Raises $50M to Bet on 'Physical AI Vision'
articles.summary: 7 月 11 日 Business Wire：Intel 旗下计算机视觉品牌 RealSense 正式完成分拆，独立公司获得 5000 万美元种子轮 + A 轮融资，估值未披露。核心方向是为人形机器人、自主车与「物理世界 AI」提供机器感知硬件。
articles.summary_en: Business Wire, July 11: Intel's RealSense computer-vision brand has completed spinout as an independent company with a $50M seed-plus-Series-A round, valuation undisclosed. Core direction: machine-perception hardware for humanoid robots, autonomous vehicles and 'physical-world AI'.
articles.content: RealSense 的分拆是 Intel 近三年「非核心业务瘦身」的一环，也是「Physical AI」赛道的信号灯。分拆后 RealSense 保留了 D400、D500、L515 三条深度相机产品线 + 12 项核心专利，服务客户包括宇树科技、Figure AI、波士顿动力、比亚迪、蔚来。5000 万融资参投方含英特尔 Capital（保留少数股权）、Founders Fund、Khosla Ventures。CEO Nadav Orbach 表示，接下来 12 个月将把摄像头模组价格从 300 美元/台压到 120 美元/台，为「1000 万台/年人形机器人」量产窗口做准备。这份分拆某种程度是 Physical AI 供应链从「大厂内部业务」走向「独立高速公司」的又一转折点。
articles.content_en: RealSense's spinout is a chapter in Intel's three-year non-core-business slimming and also a signal-flare for the Physical AI category. Post-spinout, RealSense retains the D400/D500/L515 depth-camera lines and 12 core patents, with customer coverage spanning Unitree Robotics, Figure AI, Boston Dynamics, BYD and NIO. The $50M round includes Intel Capital (minority carry), Founders Fund and Khosla Ventures. CEO Nadav Orbach: over the next 12 months, module prices will fall from $300/unit to $120/unit to prepare for a '10-million-humanoid-per-year' mass-production window. In a real sense the spinout is another inflection point of Physical AI's supply chain moving from 'inside a mega-cap' to 'independent high-velocity company'.
key_points: RealSense 完成从英特尔剥离，独立成为公司
5000 万美元种子 + A 轮，Founders Fund / Khosla 参投
客户覆盖宇树、Figure、波士顿动力、比亚迪、蔚来
12 个月内模组价格从 300 美元压到 120 美元
key_points_en: RealSense completes spinout from Intel as independent company
$50M seed + Series A, Founders Fund / Khosla participate
Customer coverage: Unitree, Figure, Boston Dynamics, BYD, NIO
Module price to drop from $300 to $120 within 12 months

articles.title: HP 与 OpenAI 战略合作再升级：工程师效率首个可验证案例出炉
articles.title_en: HP and OpenAI Deepen Strategic Cooperation: First Verifiable Engineer-Productivity Case Ships
articles.summary: AI Base 7 月 11 日：HP 与 OpenAI 宣布扩大战略合作，围绕全球客户体验与内部运营转型。首批试点显示——HP 软件工程师在采用 OpenAI 深度集成后效率显著提升（未公布具体百分比但内部称「超预期」）。
articles.summary_en: AiBase, July 11: HP and OpenAI announced expanded strategic cooperation focused on global customer experience and internal operations transformation. First pilots show HP software engineers substantially more productive after deep OpenAI integration (specific percentage undisclosed but internally described as 'above expectation').
articles.content: HP 与 OpenAI 的这次升级最值得关注的不是合作本身，而是「首批可验证案例」的存在。过去 24 个月，OpenAI 与惠普、戴尔、联想的合作被反复宣布，但从未有过工程师效率的公开量化数据。7 月 11 日发布会上，HP CTO Tuan Tran 说：「首批试点软件工程师人均效率提升幅度已经达到我们此前对 AI Agent 部署最乐观情境的上限。」更值得关注的是 HP 承诺——12 个月内将 OpenAI 深度集成覆盖全部 5.6 万名 HP 员工，成为继 Klarna（Anthropic + OpenAI 双底座）与 Coinbase（Lindy 500+ Agent）之后又一份「全员 AI 化」的企业级样本。
articles.content_en: The most noteworthy element of the HP-OpenAI expansion is not the deal itself but the existence of a first verifiable case. Over the past 24 months, OpenAI's partnerships with HP, Dell and Lenovo have been announced repeatedly without any public engineer-productivity numbers. At the July 11 event, HP CTO Tuan Tran: 'The productivity uplift for the first cohort of piloted software engineers has hit the upper bound of our most-optimistic prior AI-agent-deployment scenario.' More noteworthy: HP commits to extending deep OpenAI integration to all 56,000 HP employees within twelve months, joining Klarna (Anthropic + OpenAI dual base) and Coinbase (Lindy 500+ agents) as another 'company-wide AI-native' enterprise sample.
